<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="vi" class="">

<head>
<base href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/" />
<meta http-equiv="content-type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1, viewport-fit=cover">
<meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark">
<style>
/* Reduce "flash" before external CSS loads */
html.dark-mode,
html.dark {
background: #0b0b0b;
color: #e7e9ea;
color-scheme: dark;
}

html.dark-mode,
html.dark {
background: #0b0b0b;
}
</style>

<script>
(function() {
var key = 'hdkTheme';

function lsGet(k) {
try { return localStorage.getItem(k); } catch (e) { return null; }
}
function lsSet(k, v) {
try { localStorage.setItem(k, v); } catch (e) {}
}
function lsRemove(k) {
try { localStorage.removeItem(k); } catch (e) {}
}
function getCookie(name) {
try {
var value = ('; ' + document.cookie).split('; ' + name + '=');
if (value.length === 2) return decodeURIComponent(value.pop().split(';').shift() || '');
} catch (e) {}
return null;
}
function setCookie(name, value) {
try {
var cookie = name + '=' + encodeURIComponent(value) + '; path=/; max-age=31536000; samesite=lax';
if (location && location.protocol === 'https:') cookie += '; secure';
document.cookie = cookie;
} catch (e) {}
}
function normalizeTheme(value) {
return (value === 'light' || value === 'dark' || value === 'auto') ? value : null;
}

try {
var serverTheme = "light";
if (serverTheme === 'light' || serverTheme === 'dark' || serverTheme === 'auto') {
window.hdkServerTheme = serverTheme;
} else {
window.hdkServerTheme = null;
}

// Ưu tiên: serverTheme (DB/session/cookie) -> localStorage -> cookie
var theme = normalizeTheme(window.hdkServerTheme) || normalizeTheme(lsGet(key)) || normalizeTheme(getCookie(key));

// Tương thích ngược (keys cũ)
if (!theme) {
var darkMode = lsGet('darkMode');
var themeMode = lsGet('themeMode');
if (darkMode === 'enabled' || themeMode === 'dark') theme = 'dark';
else if (themeMode === 'auto') theme = 'auto';
else theme = 'light';
}

var isDark = false;
if (theme === 'dark') isDark = true;
else if (theme === 'auto') {
if (window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches) {
isDark = true;
} else {
var h = (new Date()).getHours();
isDark = !(h >= 6 && h < 18);
}
}

if (theme === 'light' || theme === 'dark' || theme === 'auto') {
lsSet(key, theme);
setCookie(key, theme);
lsRemove('darkMode');
lsRemove('themeMode');
}

document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark-mode', isDark);
document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark', isDark);
document.documentElement.style.colorScheme = isDark ? 'dark' : 'light';
} catch (e) {}
})();
</script>

<link rel="preload" as="image" href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/media/images/logo-mobile-2.webp" fetchpriority="high"><link rel="preload" as="image" href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/media/images/slider/slider-44206-1771579690.webp" fetchpriority="high">
<title>Hạt Đậu Khả Ái - Nền tảng đọc truyện online cho độc giả Việt</title>
<meta name="keywords" content="Hạt Đậu Khả Ái, đọc truyện online, nền tảng đọc truyện, đọc truyện miễn phí, chương VIP trả phí, mua chương VIP, tác giả dịch giả đăng truyện, bình luận đánh giá truyện, bookmark truyện, theo dõi truyện yêu thích" />
<meta name="description" content="Hạt Đậu Khả Ái là nền tảng đọc truyện online với chương miễn phí và VIP, lưu tiến độ đọc, theo dõi truyện yêu thích và hỗ trợ tác giả kiếm thu nhập từ tác phẩm." />
<link rel="canonical" href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/" />

<!-- Favicon - Đầy đủ cho Google Search, trình duyệt và thiết bị di động -->
<link rel="icon" href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/media/images/hat-dau-kha-ai/favicon.ico" sizes="any">
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="32x32" href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/icons/hatdaukhaai-favicon-32x32.png">
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="16x16" href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/icons/hatdaukhaai-favicon-16x16.png">
<link rel="shortcut icon" href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/media/images/hat-dau-kha-ai/favicon.ico" type="image/x-icon" />
<!-- Apple Touch Icon cho iOS -->
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" sizes="180x180" href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/icons/hatdaukhaai-apple-touch-icon.png">
<!-- Web App Manifest cho PWA và Android -->
<link rel="manifest" href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/icons/site.webmanifest" crossorigin="use-credentials">
<!-- Twitter Card -->
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary">
<meta name="twitter:title" content="Hạt Đậu Khả Ái - Nền tảng đọc truyện online cho độc giả Việt">
<meta name="twitter:url" content="https://hatdaukhaai.com/">
<meta name="twitter:description" content="Hạt Đậu Khả Ái là nền tảng đọc truyện online với chương miễn phí và VIP, lưu tiến độ đọc, theo dõi truyện yêu thích và hỗ trợ tác giả kiếm thu nhập từ tác phẩm.">
<meta name="twitter:image" content="https://hatdaukhaai.com/media/images/hat-dau-kha-ai/pixnova-raw-8b04a8147ea5acb93b51185bc1722587.webp">
<meta name="twitter:image:alt" content="Hạt Đậu Khả Ái - Nền tảng đọc truyện online cho độc giả Việt">
<!-- Open Graph -->
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://hatdaukhaai.com/" />
<meta property="og:title" content="Hạt Đậu Khả Ái - Nền tảng đọc truyện online cho độc giả Việt" />

<meta property="og:description" content="Hạt Đậu Khả Ái là nền tảng đọc truyện online với chương miễn phí và VIP, lưu tiến độ đọc, theo dõi truyện yêu thích và hỗ trợ tác giả kiếm thu nhập từ tác phẩm." />

<!-- 🎨 CRITICAL CSS INLINE - Header, Navigation, Hero styles (~3KB) -->
<style id="critical-css">
.hd-nav-link,.hd-nav-menu{display:flex;align-items:center}.hd-nav-link,body{color:var(--hdk-text-primary)}.btn,.hd-login-btn,.hd-nav-link{gap:6px;font-weight:500;text-decoration:none}:root{--hdk-background:#fff;--hdk-text-primary:#0f1419;--hdk-primary:#54cfd6;--hdk-card:#f7f8f8;--hdk-border:#e1eaef}.dark{--hdk-background:#000;--hdk-text-primary:#e7e9ea;--hdk-card:#17181c;--hdk-border:#242628}body{margin:0;font-family:'Be Vietnam Pro',-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,sans-serif;background:var(--hdk-background);line-height:1.5}*,::after,::before{box-sizing:border-box}.hd-nav-menu{list-style:none;margin:0;padding:0}.hd-nav-link{padding:8px 12px;font-size:14px;border-radius:8px;transition:.2s}.hd-nav-link.active,.hd-nav-link:hover{color:var(--hdk-primary);background:rgba(84,207,214,.1)}.hd-brand-logo{max-height:40px;width:auto}@media(max-width:1024px){.hd-brand-logo{max-height:32px}.wrapper{padding-top:60px}.hd-header-right .hd-nav-menu,.hd-nav-menu{display:none}}.hero-section{min-height:400px;background:var(--hdk-card)}@media(max-width:768px){.hero-section{min-height:300px}}.lenis-scrollbar{position:fixed;right:4px;top:0;bottom:0;width:6px;z-index:9999;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s}.lenis-scrollbar.visible{opacity:1}.lenis-scrollbar-thumb{width:100%;background:var(--hdk-primary);border-radius:3px}.btn,.hd-login-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;padding:8px 16px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s}.hd-login-btn{background:var(--hdk-primary);color:#fff;border:none}
</style>

<!-- ⚡ CRITICAL JAVASCRIPT - Only jQuery needed immediately -->
<script src="templates/js/jquery.min.js"></script>
<!-- 📊 DEFERRED Google Analytics - Load after page renders -->
<script>
// Defer GA loading to not block rendering
window.addEventListener('load', function() {
setTimeout(function() {
var gaScript = document.createElement('script');
gaScript.src = 'https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-ZZE2KL55J4';
gaScript.async = true;
document.head.appendChild(gaScript);

gaScript.onload = function() {
window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];

function gtag() {
dataLayer.push(arguments);
}
gtag('js', new Date());
gtag('config', 'G-ZZE2KL55J4');
};
}, 2000); // Delay 2s after load
});
</script>

</head>

</div>
<div class="hd-category-dropdown-footer">
<a href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/the-loai" class="hd-category-view-all-btn">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:widget-add-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
Xem tất cả thể loại
</a>
</div>
</div>
</li>
<!-- bảng xếp hạng -->
<li class="hd-nav-item">
<a href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/bang-xep-hang" class="hd-nav-link ">
<iconify-icon class="icon-header" icon="solar:ranking-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
<span class="menu-header-text">Xếp hạng</span>
</a>
</li>

<!-- AI TOOLS -->
<li class="hd-nav-item position-relative d-none">
<a href="#" class="hd-nav-link">
<i class="fas fa-robot"></i> AI Tools
</a>
<span class="label-new rounded-pill">Beta</span>
</li>
</ul>
<!-- tool -->
<div class="hd-header-tool">
<!-- User Controls Section -->
<div class="hd-header-user gap-2 gap-xl-2">
<!-- search button -->
<button class="hd-search-btn" title="Tìm kiếm">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:magnifer-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
</button>
<button class="hd-search-btn" id="hdkPwaInstallBtn" title="Cài đặt ứng dụng" style="display:none;">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:download-minimalistic-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
</button>
<!-- button toggle dark mode -->
<button class="hd-toggle-dark-mode" id="toggleDarkModePC">
<iconify-icon icon="line-md:moon-twotone"></iconify-icon>
</button>
<!-- Not logged in -->
<div class="hd-auth-buttons">
<a href='https://hatdaukhaai.com/dang-nhap' class="hd-login-btn">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:login-2-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon> Đăng nhập
</a>

</div>
<!-- Mobile Menu Toggle -->
<button class="hd-mobile-menu-toggle" id="mobileMenuToggle" aria-label="Menu">
<span></span>
<span></span>
<span></span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>


</div>
</nav>
</div>
</header>

<!-- Universal Search Pop-up Modal (shared IDs with mobile search) -->
<div class="hdmobile-search-modal" id="hdmobileSearchModal" style="display: none; visibility: hidden; opacity: 0;">
<div class="hdmobile-search-overlay" id="hdmobileSearchOverlay"></div>
<div class="hdmobile-search-container">
<div class="hdmobile-search-header">
<button class="hdmobile-search-close" id="hdmobileSearchClose" type="button">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:close-circle-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
</button>
<div class="hdmobile-search-input-wrapper">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:magnifer-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
<input type="text" class="hdmobile-search-input" id="hdmobileSearchInput" placeholder="Tìm kiếm truyện, tác giả, thể loại..." autocomplete="off">
<button class="hdmobile-search-voice" id="hdmobileSearchVoice" title="Tìm kiếm bằng giọng nói" type="button">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:microphone-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
</button>
</div>
</div>

<div class="hdmobile-search-content vh-scrollbar">
<!-- Quick Filters -->
<div class="hdmobile-search-filters">
<div class="hdmobile-search-filter-title">Lọc nhanh:</div>
<div class="hdmobile-search-filter-buttons">
<button class="hdmobile-filter-btn" data-filter="all" type="button">Tất cả</button>
<button class="hdmobile-filter-btn active" data-filter="story" type="button">Truyện</button>
<button class="hdmobile-filter-btn" data-filter="author" type="button">Tác giả</button>
<button class="hdmobile-filter-btn" data-filter="genre" type="button">Thể loại</button>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Search Results -->
<div class="hdmobile-search-results" id="hdmobileSearchResults">
<!-- Popular Searches -->
<div class="hdmobile-search-section">
<h4 class="hdmobile-search-section-title">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:fire-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon> Tìm kiếm phổ biến
</h4>
<div class="hdmobile-popular-searches">
<a href="#" class="hdmobile-popular-search-item"><span class="hdmobile-popular-search-item-text">Ngôn tình hiện đại</span></a>
<a href="#" class="hdmobile-popular-search-item"><span class="hdmobile-popular-search-item-text">Tiên hiệp tu luyện</span></a>
<a href="#" class="hdmobile-popular-search-item"><span class="hdmobile-popular-search-item-text">Đô thị trọng sinh</span></a>
<a href="#" class="hdmobile-popular-search-item"><span class="hdmobile-popular-search-item-text">Huyền huyễn dị năng</span></a>
<a href="#" class="hdmobile-popular-search-item"><span class="hdmobile-popular-search-item-text">Kiếm hiệp cổ điển</span></a>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Recent Searches -->
<div class="hdmobile-search-section">
<h4 class="hdmobile-search-section-title">
<i class="fas fa-history"></i> Tìm kiếm gần đây
</h4>
<div class="hdmobile-recent-searches" id="hdmobileRecentSearches">
<div class="hdmobile-empty-state">
<i class="fas fa-search"></i>
<p>Chưa có lịch sử tìm kiếm</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>


<!-- Professional Header JavaScript -->
<script>
// Enhanced Professional Header Manager
class ProfessionalHeaderManager {
constructor() {
this.header = document.getElementById('mainHeader');
this.lastScrollTop = 0;
this.scrollThreshold = 5;
this.isHeaderHidden = false;
this.searchTimeout = null;
this.init();
}

init() {
this.bindScrollEvents();
this.initDropdowns();
this.initMobileMenu();
this.initSearch();
this.initResizeHandler();
// this.adjustBodyPadding();
}

bindScrollEvents() {
let ticking = false;

window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
if (!ticking) {
requestAnimationFrame(() => {
this.handleScroll();
ticking = false;
});
ticking = true;
}
});
}

handleScroll() {
const currentScrollTop = window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

if (Math.abs(currentScrollTop - this.lastScrollTop) < this.scrollThreshold) {
return;
}
if (currentScrollTop > this.lastScrollTop && currentScrollTop > 120) {
// Scrolling down - hide header
this.hideHeader();
} else {
// Scrolling up - show header
this.showHeader();
}

if (currentScrollTop > 120) {
this.header.classList.add('scrolled');
} else {
this.header.classList.remove('scrolled');
}

this.lastScrollTop = currentScrollTop;
}

hideHeader() {
if (!this.isHeaderHidden) {
this.header.classList.add('hd-header-hidden');
this.isHeaderHidden = true;
}
}

showHeader() {
if (this.isHeaderHidden) {
this.header.classList.remove('hd-header-hidden');
this.isHeaderHidden = false;
}
}

initDropdowns() {
// Profile dropdown
const profileToggle = document.getElementById('profileToggle');
const profileDropdown = document.getElementById('profileDropdown');

if (profileToggle && profileDropdown) {
profileToggle.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
e.preventDefault();
e.stopPropagation();

// Close other dropdowns
document.querySelectorAll('.hd-profile-dropdown-menu.active').forEach(dropdown => {
if (dropdown !== profileDropdown) {
dropdown.classList.remove('active');
}
});

profileDropdown.classList.toggle('active');
});

// Close dropdown when clicking outside
document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
if (!profileToggle.contains(e.target) && !profileDropdown.contains(e.target)) {
profileDropdown.classList.remove('active');
}
});
}

// Navigation dropdowns
const navDropdowns = document.querySelectorAll('.hd-nav-dropdown');
navDropdowns.forEach(dropdown => {
const menu = dropdown.querySelector('.hd-nav-dropdown-menu');
let timeoutId;

dropdown.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
clearTimeout(timeoutId);
menu?.classList.add('active');
});

dropdown.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
timeoutId = setTimeout(() => {
menu?.classList.remove('active');
}, 150);
});
});
}

initMobileMenu() {
const mobileToggle = document.getElementById('mobileMenuToggle');
const mobileSidebar = document.getElementById('mobileSidebar');
const mobileOverlay = document.getElementById('mobileSidebarOverlay');
const mobileClose = document.getElementById('mobileSidebarClose');

if (mobileToggle && mobileSidebar && mobileOverlay) {
mobileToggle.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
e.stopPropagation();
this.openMobileMenu();
});

mobileClose?.addEventListener('click', () => {
this.closeMobileMenu();
});

mobileOverlay.addEventListener('click', () => {
this.closeMobileMenu();
});

// Close mobile menu when pressing ESC
document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
if (e.key === 'Escape' && mobileSidebar.classList.contains('active')) {
this.closeMobileMenu();
}
});
}
}

openMobileMenu() {
const mobileSidebar = document.getElementById('mobileSidebar');
const mobileOverlay = document.getElementById('mobileSidebarOverlay');

if (mobileSidebar && mobileOverlay) {
mobileSidebar.classList.add('active');
mobileOverlay.classList.add('active');
document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';

// Focus management for accessibility
setTimeout(() => {
const closeButton = document.getElementById('mobileSidebarClose');
closeButton?.focus();
}, 100);
}
}

closeMobileMenu() {
const mobileSidebar = document.getElementById('mobileSidebar');
const mobileOverlay = document.getElementById('mobileSidebarOverlay');

if (mobileSidebar && mobileOverlay) {
mobileSidebar.classList.remove('active');
mobileOverlay.classList.remove('active');
document.body.style.overflow = '';

// Return focus to toggle button
const mobileToggle = document.getElementById('mobileMenuToggle');
mobileToggle?.focus();
}
}

initSearch() {
const searchInput = document.querySelector('.hd-search-input');
const searchSuggestions = document.getElementById('searchSuggestions');

if (searchInput && searchSuggestions) {
searchInput.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
clearTimeout(this.searchTimeout);
const query = e.target.value.trim();

if (query.length >= 2) {
this.searchTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
this.performSearch(query);
}, 300);
} else {
searchSuggestions.classList.remove('active');
}
});

searchInput.addEventListener('focus', () => {
if (searchInput.value.trim().length >= 2) {
searchSuggestions.classList.add('active');
}
});

// Close suggestions when clicking outside
document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
if (!searchInput.contains(e.target) && !searchSuggestions.contains(e.target)) {
searchSuggestions.classList.remove('active');
}
});

// Handle Enter key for search
searchInput.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
if (e.key === 'Enter') {
e.preventDefault();
this.executeSearch(searchInput.value.trim());
}
});
}
}

performSearch(query) {
const searchSuggestions = document.getElementById('searchSuggestions');
const suggestionsContainer = searchSuggestions.querySelector('.hd-search-items');

if (!suggestionsContainer) return;

// Show loading state
suggestionsContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="hd-search-loading"><i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> Đang tìm kiếm...</div>';
searchSuggestions.classList.add('active');

// Simulate search API call - replace with actual AJAX call
setTimeout(() => {
const mockResults = [{
title: `"${query}" trong Ngôn tình`,
url: `#search=${query}&category=ngon-tinh`,
icon: 'fas fa-heart'
},
{
title: `"${query}" trong Tiên hiệp`,
url: `#search=${query}&category=tien-hiep`,
icon: 'fas fa-magic'
},
{
title: `Tác giả "${query}"`,
url: `#author=${query}`,
icon: 'fas fa-user'
}
];

suggestionsContainer.innerHTML = mockResults.map(result =>
`<a href="${result.url}" class="hd-search-item">
<i class="${result.icon}"></i>
<span>${result.title}</span>
</a>`
).join('');
}, 500);
}

executeSearch(query) {
if (query) {
window.location.href = `${window.location.origin}${window.location.pathname}?search=${encodeURIComponent(query)}`;
}
}

initResizeHandler() {
let resizeTimeout;
window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
clearTimeout(resizeTimeout);
resizeTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
// this.adjustBodyPadding();

// Close mobile menu if window becomes large
if (window.innerWidth > 768) {
this.closeMobileMenu();
}
}, 100);
});
}

adjustBodyPadding() {
if (this.header) {
const headerHeight = this.header.offsetHeight;
document.body.style.paddingTop = `${headerHeight}px`;
}
}
}

// Initialize Professional Header when DOM is ready
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
new ProfessionalHeaderManager();
});

// Legacy compatibility
var isLogin = 0;

(function() {
const defaultTranslatorUrl = 'https://hatdaukhaai.com/dich-truyen-han-viet';
const defaultLoginUrl = 'https://hatdaukhaai.com/dang-nhap';

window.HDKTranslatorAccess = {
translatorUrl: defaultTranslatorUrl,
loginUrl: defaultLoginUrl,

savePreviousPage(targetUrl = defaultTranslatorUrl) {
try {
localStorage.setItem('previous_page', targetUrl);
} catch (error) {
console.warn('Không thể lưu previous_page cho tool dịch truyện:', error);
}
},

redirectToLogin(targetUrl = defaultTranslatorUrl, loginUrl = defaultLoginUrl) {
this.savePreviousPage(targetUrl);
window.location.href = loginUrl;
},

requireLogin(options = {}) {
const targetUrl = options.targetUrl || defaultTranslatorUrl;
const loginUrl = options.loginUrl || defaultLoginUrl;

if (window.isLogin) {
window.location.href = targetUrl;
return;
}

const proceedToLogin = () => this.redirectToLogin(targetUrl, loginUrl);

if (typeof Swal === 'undefined' || typeof Swal.fire !== 'function') {
if (window.confirm('Bạn cần đăng nhập để sử dụng tính năng này. Chuyển tới trang đăng nhập?')) {
proceedToLogin();
}
return;
}

Swal.fire({
title: 'Yêu cầu đăng nhập',
text: 'Bạn cần đăng nhập để sử dụng tính năng này',
icon: 'info',
showCancelButton: true,
confirmButtonColor: '#54cfd6',
cancelButtonColor: '#6c757d',
confirmButtonText: 'Đăng nhập',
cancelButtonText: 'Hủy',
reverseButtons: true
}).then((result) => {
if (result.isConfirmed) {
proceedToLogin();
}
});
}
};

document.addEventListener('click', function(event) {
const trigger = event.target.closest('[data-translator-guard="1"]');
if (!trigger) {
return;
}

event.preventDefault();

const targetUrl = trigger.getAttribute('data-translator-url') || defaultTranslatorUrl;
const loginUrl = trigger.getAttribute('data-login-url') || defaultLoginUrl;

window.HDKTranslatorAccess.requireLogin({
targetUrl,
loginUrl
});
});
})();
</script>

<script>
// Enhanced logout functionality with SweetAlert2
$(document).ready(function() {
// Show logout confirmation with SweetAlert2
$('.hd-logout-item, .hd-mobile-nav-item.logout').on('click', function(e) {
e.preventDefault();

Swal.fire({
title: 'Đăng xuất?',
text: 'Bạn có chắc chắn muốn đăng xuất khỏi tài khoản?',
icon: 'question',
showCancelButton: true,
confirmButtonColor: '#54cfd6',
cancelButtonColor: '#6c757d',
confirmButtonText: '<i class="fas fa-sign-out-alt"></i> Đăng xuất',
cancelButtonText: '<i class="fas fa-times"></i> Hủy',
reverseButtons: true,
customClass: {
popup: 'swal2-popup-custom',
confirmButton: 'swal2-confirm-custom',
cancelButton: 'swal2-cancel-custom'
}
}).then((result) => {
if (result.isConfirmed) {
// Hiển thị loading
Swal.fire({
title: 'Đang đăng xuất...',
allowOutsideClick: false,
allowEscapeKey: false,
showConfirmButton: false,
didOpen: () => {
Swal.showLoading();
}
});

// Gọi AJAX đăng xuất
$.ajax({
url: 'https://hatdaukhaai.com/sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/logout.php',
type: 'POST',
data: {
action: 'logout'
},
dataType: 'json',
timeout: 10000,
success: function(response) {
Swal.close();

if (response.status === 1) {
// Clear cookies
document.cookie = "hdkai_login=; expires=Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 UTC; path=/;";

// Show success notification
if (typeof FuiToast !== 'undefined') {
FuiToast.success('Đăng xuất thành công!');
}

// Redirect after short delay
setTimeout(() => {
window.location.href = 'https://hatdaukhaai.com/';
}, 1000);
} else {
if (typeof FuiToast !== 'undefined') {
FuiToast.error(response.msg || 'Lỗi không xác định');
}
}
},
error: function(xhr, status, error) {
Swal.close();
console.error('Logout error:', error);

let errorMsg = 'Có lỗi xảy ra khi đăng xuất. Vui lòng thử lại!';
if (status === 'timeout') {
errorMsg = 'Kết nối quá chậm. Vui lòng thử lại!';
}

if (typeof FuiToast !== 'undefined') {
FuiToast.error(errorMsg);
}
}
});
}
});
});

// Desktop Search Modal Functions
const searchModal = document.getElementById('hdmobileSearchModal');

// Function để mở modal search
function openDesktopSearchModal() {
if (searchModal) {
// Hiển thị modal - set explicit styles để override inline styles
searchModal.style.display = 'flex';
searchModal.style.visibility = 'visible';
searchModal.style.opacity = '1';

// Force reflow để animation hoạt động
searchModal.offsetHeight;

searchModal.classList.add('active');
document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';

// Focus vào input search
setTimeout(() => {
const searchInput = document.getElementById('hdmobileSearchInput');
if (searchInput) {
searchInput.focus();
}
}, 300);
}
}

// Function để đóng modal search
function closeDesktopSearchModal() {
if (searchModal) {
searchModal.classList.remove('active');
document.body.style.overflow = '';

// Ẩn modal sau khi animation kết thúc
setTimeout(() => {
if (!searchModal.classList.contains('active')) {
searchModal.style.display = 'none';
searchModal.style.visibility = 'hidden';
searchModal.style.opacity = '0';
}
}, 300);
}
}

// Desktop Search Button - Mở modal khi click
const desktopSearchBtn = document.querySelector('.hd-header-tool .hd-search-btn');
if (desktopSearchBtn) {
desktopSearchBtn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
e.preventDefault();
e.stopPropagation();
openDesktopSearchModal();
});
}

// Close button (X) - Đóng modal khi click
const searchCloseBtn = document.getElementById('hdmobileSearchClose');
if (searchCloseBtn) {
searchCloseBtn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
e.preventDefault();
closeDesktopSearchModal();
});
}

// Overlay - Đóng modal khi click vào overlay
const searchOverlay = document.getElementById('hdmobileSearchOverlay');
if (searchOverlay) {
searchOverlay.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
closeDesktopSearchModal();
});
}

// ESC key - Đóng modal khi nhấn ESC
document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
if (e.key === 'Escape' && searchModal && searchModal.classList.contains('active')) {
closeDesktopSearchModal();
}
});

// ============================================
// Desktop Search Input Handler
// ============================================
const desktopSearchInput = document.getElementById('hdmobileSearchInput');
const desktopSearchResults = document.getElementById('hdmobileSearchResults');
let desktopSearchTimer = null;
let currentFilter = 'story';
let desktopSearchXhr = null;
const desktopSearchCache = new Map();
const DESKTOP_SEARCH_CACHE_TTL_MS = 30000;

function getDesktopSearchCacheKey(filter, query) {
return `${filter || 'all'}|${String(query || '').toLowerCase()}`;
}

function getDesktopCachedResponse(filter, query) {
const key = getDesktopSearchCacheKey(filter, query);
const entry = desktopSearchCache.get(key);
if (!entry) return null;
if (Date.now() - entry.t > DESKTOP_SEARCH_CACHE_TTL_MS) {
desktopSearchCache.delete(key);
return null;
}
return entry.r || null;
}

function setDesktopCachedResponse(filter, query, response) {
const key = getDesktopSearchCacheKey(filter, query);
desktopSearchCache.set(key, {
t: Date.now(),
r: response
});
if (desktopSearchCache.size > 50) {
const firstKey = desktopSearchCache.keys().next().value;
if (firstKey) desktopSearchCache.delete(firstKey);
}
}

// Handle search input với debounce
if (desktopSearchInput) {
desktopSearchInput.addEventListener('input', function(e) {
clearTimeout(desktopSearchTimer);
const query = e.target.value.trim();

if (query.length >= 2) {
const cached = getDesktopCachedResponse(currentFilter, query);
if (cached) {
displayDesktopSearchResults(cached, query);
return;
}

showDesktopSearchLoading();
desktopSearchTimer = setTimeout(() => {
performDesktopSearch(query);
}, 250);
} else if (query.length === 0) {
showDesktopDefaultContent();
} else {
showDesktopMinLengthMessage();
}
});
}

// Handle filter buttons
document.querySelectorAll('.hdmobile-filter-btn').forEach(btn => {
btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
e.preventDefault();
document.querySelectorAll('.hdmobile-filter-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
this.classList.add('active');
currentFilter = this.getAttribute('data-filter');

const query = desktopSearchInput?.value.trim();
if (query && query.length >= 2) {
const cached = getDesktopCachedResponse(currentFilter, query);
if (cached) {
displayDesktopSearchResults(cached, query);
} else {
showDesktopSearchLoading();
performDesktopSearch(query);
}
}
});
});

// Perform search via AJAX
function performDesktopSearch(query) {
const requestFilter = currentFilter;
const cached = getDesktopCachedResponse(requestFilter, query);
if (cached) {
displayDesktopSearchResults(cached, query);
return;
}

if (desktopSearchXhr && desktopSearchXhr.readyState !== 4) {
desktopSearchXhr.abort();
}

desktopSearchXhr = $.ajax({
url: "sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/tim-kiem-truyen.php",
type: "POST",
dataType: "json",
timeout: 10000,
data: {
keyword: query,
filter: requestFilter
},
success: function(response) {
// Ignore stale responses (race condition)
if (desktopSearchInput && desktopSearchInput.value.trim() !== query) return;
if (requestFilter !== currentFilter) return;

setDesktopCachedResponse(requestFilter, query, response);
displayDesktopSearchResults(response, query);
if (response.status === 'success') {
saveDesktopRecentSearch(query);
}
},
error: function(_xhr, status) {
if (status === 'abort') return;
displayDesktopSearchError();
}
});
}

// Display search results
function displayDesktopSearchResults(response, query) {
if (!desktopSearchResults) return;

if (response.status === 'success' && response.html) {
const exactCount = parseInt(response?.meta?.exact_story_count || 0, 10) || 0;
const relatedCount = parseInt(response?.meta?.related_story_count || 0, 10) || 0;
let relevanceText = '';
if (exactCount > 0 || relatedCount > 0) {
const textParts = [];
if (exactCount > 0) textParts.push(`${exactCount} khớp chính xác`);
if (relatedCount > 0) textParts.push(`${relatedCount} liên quan`);
relevanceText = `<span class="hdmobile-search-relevance-summary">(${textParts.join(', ')})</span>`;
}

desktopSearchResults.innerHTML = `
<div class="hdmobile-search-section">
<h4 class="hdmobile-search-section-title">
<i class="fas fa-search"></i> Tìm thấy ${response.count || ''} kết quả ${relevanceText}
</h4>
<div class="hdmobile-search-results-list">
${response.html}
</div>
</div>
`;
} else if (response.status === 'empty') {
desktopSearchResults.innerHTML = `
<div class="hdmobile-empty-state">
<i class="fas fa-search"></i>
<p>${response.message || 'Không tìm thấy kết quả cho "' + query + '"'}</p>
<div class="hdmobile-search-suggestions">
<p class="hdmobile-search-suggestion-text">Gợi ý:</p>
<ul>
<li>Kiểm tra lại chính tả</li>
<li>Thử dùng từ khóa ngắn hơn</li>
<li>Thử dùng tên không dấu</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
`;
} else {
desktopSearchResults.innerHTML = `
<div class="hdmobile-empty-state">
<i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle"></i>
<p>${response.message || 'Có lỗi xảy ra'}</p>
</div>
`;
}
}

function displayDesktopSearchError() {
if (desktopSearchResults) {
desktopSearchResults.innerHTML = `
<div class="hdmobile-empty-state">
<i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle"></i>
<p>Có lỗi xảy ra khi tìm kiếm. Vui lòng thử lại!</p>
</div>
`;
}
}

function showDesktopSearchLoading() {
if (desktopSearchResults) {
desktopSearchResults.innerHTML = `
<div class="hdmobile-search-loading">
<div class="hdmobile-search-spinner"></div>
<p>Đang tìm kiếm...</p>
</div>
`;
}
}

function showDesktopMinLengthMessage() {
if (desktopSearchResults) {
desktopSearchResults.innerHTML = `
<div class="hdmobile-empty-state">
<i class="fas fa-keyboard"></i>
<p>Nhập ít nhất 2 ký tự để tìm kiếm</p>
</div>
`;
}
}

function showDesktopDefaultContent() {
if (!desktopSearchResults) return;
const recentSearches = getDesktopRecentSearches();
let recentHtml = '';

if (recentSearches.length > 0) {
recentHtml = `
<div class="hdmobile-search-section">
<h4 class="hdmobile-search-section-title">
<i class="fas fa-history"></i> Tìm kiếm gần đây
<button class="hdmobile-clear-recent" onclick="clearDesktopRecentSearches()">Xóa</button>
</h4>
<div class="hdmobile-recent-searches">
${recentSearches.map(search => `
<a href="#" class="hdmobile-recent-search-item" onclick="searchFromRecent('${search}'); return false;">
<i class="fas fa-history"></i>
<span>${search}</span>
</a>
`).join('')}
</div>
</div>
`;
}

desktopSearchResults.innerHTML = `
<div class="hdmobile-search-section">
<h4 class="hdmobile-search-section-title">
<i class="fas fa-fire"></i> Tìm kiếm phổ biến
</h4>
<div class="hdmobile-popular-searches">
<a href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/search?s=ngon-tinh" class="hdmobile-popular-search-item">
<span class="hdmobile-popular-search-item-text">Ngôn tình hiện đại</span>
</a>
<a href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/search?s=tien-hiep" class="hdmobile-popular-search-item">
<span class="hdmobile-popular-search-item-text">Tiên hiệp tu luyện</span>
</a>
<a href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/search?s=do-thi" class="hdmobile-popular-search-item">
<span class="hdmobile-popular-search-item-text">Đô thị trọng sinh</span>
</a>
<a href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/search?s=huyen-huyen" class="hdmobile-popular-search-item">
<span class="hdmobile-popular-search-item-text">Huyền huyễn dị năng</span>
</a>
</div>
</div>
${recentHtml}
`;
}

// LocalStorage functions for recent searches
function saveDesktopRecentSearch(query) {
if (!query || query.length < 2) return;
let searches = getDesktopRecentSearches();
searches = searches.filter(s => s.toLowerCase() !== query.toLowerCase());
searches.unshift(query);
searches = searches.slice(0, 10);
localStorage.setItem('hdkaiRecentSearches', JSON.stringify(searches));
}

function getDesktopRecentSearches() {
try {
const stored = localStorage.getItem('hdkaiRecentSearches');
return stored ? JSON.parse(stored) : [];
} catch (e) {
return [];
}
}

function clearDesktopRecentSearches() {
localStorage.removeItem('hdkaiRecentSearches');
showDesktopDefaultContent();
}

function searchFromRecent(query) {
if (desktopSearchInput) {
desktopSearchInput.value = query;
performDesktopSearch(query);
}
}
// Make functions globally accessible
window.clearDesktopRecentSearches = clearDesktopRecentSearches;
window.searchFromRecent = searchFromRecent;

// ============================================
// NOTIFICATION DROPDOWN - Facebook Style
// ============================================
const notificationDropdown = document.getElementById('notificationDropdown');
const notificationToggle = document.getElementById('notificationToggle');
const notificationPanel = document.getElementById('notificationPanel');
const notificationLoading = document.getElementById('notificationLoading');
const notificationList = document.getElementById('headerNotificationList');
const notificationEmpty = document.getElementById('notificationEmpty');
const notificationBadge = document.querySelector('.hd-notification-badge');
const markAllReadBtn = document.getElementById('headerMarkAllReadBtn');

let notificationsLoaded = false;
let notificationRefreshInterval = null;

// Toggle notification dropdown
if (notificationToggle && notificationPanel) {
notificationToggle.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
e.preventDefault();
e.stopPropagation();

// Close other dropdowns
document.querySelectorAll('.hd-profile-dropdown-menu.active').forEach(d => d.classList.remove('active'));

notificationDropdown.classList.toggle('active');

// Load notifications if first time opening
if (notificationDropdown.classList.contains('active') && !notificationsLoaded) {
loadNotifications();
}
});

// Close when clicking outside
document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
if (notificationDropdown && !notificationDropdown.contains(e.target)) {
notificationDropdown.classList.remove('active');
}
});

// Close on ESC
document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
if (e.key === 'Escape' && notificationDropdown.classList.contains('active')) {
notificationDropdown.classList.remove('active');
}
});
}

// Load notifications via AJAX
function loadNotifications() {
if (notificationLoading) notificationLoading.style.display = 'block';
if (notificationList) notificationList.style.display = 'none';
if (notificationEmpty) notificationEmpty.style.display = 'none';

$.ajax({
url: 'https://hatdaukhaai.com/sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/load-notifications.php',
type: 'GET',
dataType: 'json',
timeout: 10000,
success: function(response) {
if (notificationLoading) notificationLoading.style.display = 'none';

if (response.status === 'success' && response.data && response.data.length > 0) {
renderNotifications(response.data);
if (notificationList) notificationList.style.display = 'block';
} else {
if (notificationEmpty) notificationEmpty.style.display = 'flex';
}

// Update badge
if (response.unread_count !== undefined) {
updateNotificationBadge(response.unread_count);
}

notificationsLoaded = true;
},
error: function() {
if (notificationLoading) notificationLoading.style.display = 'none';
if (notificationEmpty) {
notificationEmpty.style.display = 'flex';
notificationEmpty.querySelector('.hd-notification-empty-text').textContent = 'Không thể tải thông báo';
}
}
});
}

// Render notification items
function renderNotifications(notifications) {
if (!notificationList) return;

const typeIcons = {
1: {
icon: 'solar:book-bold-duotone',
class: 'type-chapter'
},
2: {
icon: 'solar:chat-round-dots-bold-duotone',
class: 'type-comment'
},
3: {
icon: 'solar:reply-bold-duotone',
class: 'type-reply'
},
4: {
icon: 'solar:user-plus-bold-duotone',
class: 'type-follow'
},
5: {
icon: 'solar:gift-bold-duotone',
class: 'type-gift'
},
6: {
icon: 'solar:wallet-money-bold-duotone',
class: 'type-gift'
},
7: {
icon: 'solar:info-circle-bold-duotone',
class: 'type-system'
},
8: {
icon: 'solar:danger-triangle-bold-duotone',
class: 'type-warning'
},
9: {
icon: 'solar:check-circle-bold-duotone',
class: 'type-approve'
},
10: {
icon: 'solar:close-circle-bold-duotone',
class: 'type-reject'
}
};

let html = '';
notifications.forEach(function(notif) {
const isUnread = notif.view == 0;
const typeInfo = typeIcons[notif.type] || {
icon: 'solar:bell-bold-duotone',
class: 'type-system'
};
const avatar = notif.sender_avatar || 'media/images/avatar/default.webp';
const link = notif.link || '#';

// Check important notifications
const isAdminMsg = notif.reference_type === 'admin_member_message';
const isUrgeChapter = notif.reference_type === 'story_chapter_urge_admin';
const adminMsgId = isAdminMsg ? (notif.reference_id || 0) : 0;
const isImportant = isAdminMsg || isUrgeChapter;
const importantClass = isImportant ? 'hd-notification-item--important' : '';
const importantBadge = isAdminMsg
? '<span class="hd-notification-badge-important">Quan trọng</span>'
: (isUrgeChapter ? '<span class="hd-notification-badge-important">Hối chương</span>' : '');

html += `
<li>
<a href="${isAdminMsg ? 'javascript:void(0)' : link}"
class="hd-notification-item ${isUnread ? 'unread' : ''} ${importantClass}"
data-id="${notif.id}"
${isAdminMsg ? `data-admin-msg="1" data-msg-id="${adminMsgId}"` : ''}>
<div class="hd-notification-avatar">
<img src="${avatar}" alt="" onerror="this.src='media/images/avatar/default.webp'">
<span class="hd-notification-avatar-icon ${typeInfo.class}">
<iconify-icon icon="${typeInfo.icon}"></iconify-icon>
</span>
</div>
<div class="hd-notification-info">
<p class="hd-notification-text">${importantBadge}${notif.content || notif.title}</p>
<span class="hd-notification-time">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:clock-circle-linear"></iconify-icon>
${notif.time_ago || notif.created_at}
</span>
</div>
<div class="hd-notification-unread-dot"></div>
</a>
</li>
`;
});

notificationList.innerHTML = html;

// Mark as read when clicking notification
notificationList.querySelectorAll('.hd-notification-item').forEach(function(item) {
item.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
const id = this.getAttribute('data-id');
const isAdminMsg = this.getAttribute('data-admin-msg') === '1';
const msgId = this.getAttribute('data-msg-id');

// If admin message, open popup instead
if (isAdminMsg && msgId) {
e.preventDefault();
openAdminMessageFromHeader(msgId, this);
return;
}

if (id && this.classList.contains('unread')) {
markNotificationRead(id);
this.classList.remove('unread');
}
});
});
}

// Mark single notification as read
function markNotificationRead(id) {
$.ajax({
url: 'https://hatdaukhaai.com/sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/mark-notification-read.php',
type: 'POST',
data: {
id: id
},
dataType: 'json',
success: function(response) {
if (response.status === 'success' && response.unread_count !== undefined) {
updateNotificationBadge(response.unread_count);
}
}
});
}

// Mark all notifications as read
if (markAllReadBtn) {
markAllReadBtn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
e.preventDefault();

$.ajax({
url: 'https://hatdaukhaai.com/sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/mark-all-notifications-read.php',
type: 'POST',
dataType: 'json',
success: function(response) {
if (response.status === 'success') {
// Remove unread class from all items
notificationList.querySelectorAll('.hd-notification-item.unread').forEach(function(item) {
item.classList.remove('unread');
});
updateNotificationBadge(0);

if (typeof FuiToast !== 'undefined') {
// FuiToast.success('Đã đánh dấu tất cả đã đọc');
}
}
}
});
});
}

// Update notification badge
function updateNotificationBadge(count) {
if (notificationBadge) {
const num = parseInt(count) || 0;
notificationBadge.textContent = num > 99 ? '99+' : num;
notificationBadge.setAttribute('data-count', num);
notificationBadge.style.display = num > 0 ? 'flex' : 'none';
}
}

// Auto refresh unread count every 30 seconds
function startNotificationRefresh() {
notificationRefreshInterval = setInterval(function() {
$.ajax({
url: 'https://hatdaukhaai.com/sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/count-unread-notifications.php',
type: 'GET',
dataType: 'json',
success: function(response) {
if (response.status === 'success' && response.count !== undefined) {
updateNotificationBadge(response.count);
}
}
});
}, 30000);
}

// Start auto-refresh if user is logged in
// Open admin message popup from header dropdown (uses custom modal)
function openAdminMessageFromHeader(msgId, itemEl) {
// Close dropdown
if (notificationDropdown) {
notificationDropdown.classList.remove('active');
}

// Show loading
showHeaderMsgLoading();

$.ajax({
url: 'https://hatdaukhaai.com/sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/open-admin-member-message.php',
type: 'GET',
data: {
msg: msgId
},
dataType: 'json',
success: function(response) {
hideHeaderMsgLoading();

if (response.status === 'success' && response.data) {
const data = response.data;

// Update unread count
if (data.was_unread) {
updateNotificationBadge(response.unread_count);
if (itemEl) {
itemEl.classList.remove('unread');
}
}

// Show custom modal
showHeaderAdminMsgModal(data);
} else {
if (typeof FuiToast !== 'undefined') {
FuiToast.error(response.message || 'Không thể tải nội dung thông báo');
} else {
alert(response.message || 'Không thể tải nội dung thông báo');
}
}
},
error: function() {
hideHeaderMsgLoading();
if (typeof FuiToast !== 'undefined') {
FuiToast.error('Không thể kết nối server');
} else {
alert('Không thể kết nối server');
}
}
});
}

function showHeaderMsgLoading() {
if (!document.getElementById('hdkHeaderMsgLoading')) {
const html = `<div id="hdkHeaderMsgLoading" class="hdk-admin-msg-loading">
<div class="hdk-admin-msg-loading-spinner">
<iconify-icon icon="svg-spinners:ring-resize" style="font-size: 48px;"></iconify-icon>
<span>Đang tải...</span>
</div>
</div>`;
document.body.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', html);
}
document.getElementById('hdkHeaderMsgLoading').classList.add('show');
}

function hideHeaderMsgLoading() {
const el = document.getElementById('hdkHeaderMsgLoading');
if (el) el.classList.remove('show');
}

// Helper: Process HTML to lazy load videos
function processVideoLazyLoadHeader(html) {
if (!html) return '';
const temp = document.createElement('div');
temp.innerHTML = html;
temp.querySelectorAll('video source').forEach(source => {
if (source.src) {
source.dataset.lazySrc = source.src;
source.removeAttribute('src');
}
});
temp.querySelectorAll('video[src]').forEach(video => {
video.dataset.lazySrc = video.src;
video.removeAttribute('src');
});
return temp.innerHTML;
}

// Helper: Activate lazy loaded videos
function activateVideosHeader(container) {
if (!container) return;
container.querySelectorAll('video source[data-lazy-src]').forEach(source => {
source.src = source.dataset.lazySrc;
source.removeAttribute('data-lazy-src');
});
container.querySelectorAll('video[data-lazy-src]').forEach(video => {
video.src = video.dataset.lazySrc;
video.removeAttribute('data-lazy-src');
});
container.querySelectorAll('video').forEach(video => {
video.load();
if (video.hasAttribute('autoplay')) {
video.muted = true;
video.play().catch(() => {});
}
});
}

// Helper: Pause all videos
function pauseAllVideosHeader(container) {
if (!container) return;
container.querySelectorAll('video').forEach(video => {
video.pause();
video.currentTime = 0;
});
}

function showHeaderAdminMsgModal(data) {
const senderDisplay = escapeHtmlHeader(data.sender_name || 'Ban Quản Trị');

// Process video for lazy loading
const processedContent = processVideoLazyLoadHeader(data.content_html || '');

// Remove existing
const existing = document.getElementById('hdkHeaderMsgModal');
if (existing) existing.remove();

const modalHtml = `
<div id="hdkHeaderMsgModal" class="hdk-admin-msg-modal">
<div class="hdk-admin-msg-modal-overlay"></div>
<div class="hdk-admin-msg-modal-container">
<div class="hdk-admin-msg-modal-content">
<div class="hdk-admin-msg-modal-header">
<div class="hdk-admin-msg-modal-badge">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:shield-star-bold"></iconify-icon>
<span>Thông báo từ ${senderDisplay}</span>
</div>
<button type="button" class="hdk-admin-msg-modal-close" onclick="closeHeaderMsgModal()">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:close-circle-bold"></iconify-icon>
</button>
</div>
<div class="hdk-admin-msg-modal-body vh-scrollbar">
<h2 class="hdk-admin-msg-modal-title">${escapeHtmlHeader(data.title || '')}</h2>
${data.short_desc ? `<p class="hdk-admin-msg-modal-desc">${escapeHtmlHeader(data.short_desc)}</p>` : ''}
<div class="hdk-admin-msg-modal-divider"></div>
<div class="hdk-admin-msg-modal-html-content">${processedContent}</div>
</div>
<div class="hdk-admin-msg-modal-footer">
<div class="hdk-admin-msg-modal-meta">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:clock-circle-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
<span>${data.created_formatted || ''}</span>
</div>
<button type="button" class="hdk-admin-msg-modal-btn" onclick="closeHeaderMsgModal()">Đã hiểu</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
`;

document.body.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', modalHtml);
requestAnimationFrame(() => {
document.getElementById('hdkHeaderMsgModal').classList.add('show');

// Wrap images trong content với Fancybox
initFancyboxForHeaderMsg();
});

document.querySelector('#hdkHeaderMsgModal .hdk-admin-msg-modal-overlay').addEventListener('click', closeHeaderMsgModal);
document.addEventListener('keydown', handleHeaderEscClose);

// Stop Lenis scroll and lock body
window.hdkModalOpen?.();
}

// Wrap images trong header message content với Fancybox và activate videos
function initFancyboxForHeaderMsg() {
const container = document.querySelector('#hdkHeaderMsgModal .hdk-admin-msg-modal-html-content');
if (!container) return;

// Activate lazy loaded videos
activateVideosHeader(container);

// Wrap images with Fancybox
const images = container.querySelectorAll('img');
images.forEach((img, index) => {
// Skip if already wrapped
if (img.parentElement.tagName === 'A' && img.parentElement.hasAttribute('data-fancybox')) {
return;
}

// Create wrapper anchor
const wrapper = document.createElement('a');
wrapper.href = img.src;
wrapper.setAttribute('data-fancybox', 'header-msg-gallery');
wrapper.setAttribute('data-caption', img.alt || 'Hình ảnh ' + (index + 1));

// Style wrapper
wrapper.style.display = 'block';
wrapper.style.cursor = 'zoom-in';

// Wrap image
img.parentNode.insertBefore(wrapper, img);
wrapper.appendChild(img);
});

// Fancybox v5: bind gallery cho dynamic images (event delegation tự xử lý)
if (typeof Fancybox !== 'undefined') {
Fancybox.bind('[data-fancybox="header-msg-gallery"]', {
Toolbar: {
display: ['zoom', 'close']
},
loop: true,
contentProtect: true,
mainClass: 'fancybox-admin-msg'
});
}
}

function handleHeaderEscClose(e) {
if (e.key === 'Escape') closeHeaderMsgModal();
}

window.closeHeaderMsgModal = function() {
const modal = document.getElementById('hdkHeaderMsgModal');
if (modal) {
// Pause all videos before closing
const contentContainer = modal.querySelector('.hdk-admin-msg-modal-html-content');
pauseAllVideosHeader(contentContainer);

modal.classList.remove('show');
setTimeout(() => modal.remove(), 300);
}
document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleHeaderEscClose);

// Restore Lenis scroll and body
window.hdkModalClose?.();
};

function escapeHtmlHeader(text) {
if (!text) return '';
const div = document.createElement('div');
div.textContent = text;
return div.innerHTML;
}

// Make functions globally accessible
window.loadNotifications = loadNotifications;
window.updateNotificationBadge = updateNotificationBadge;
window.openAdminMessageFromHeader = openAdminMessageFromHeader;
});
</script>


<!-- Fancybox v5 đã load global từ css.php / js.php (không cần Fancybox v3 jQuery nữa) -->
<!-- Menu mobi start -->
<!-- Menu mobile end -->
<!-- Hero Slider -->
<section class="hero-slider p-0 m-0 position-relative">
<div class="hero-slider-wrapper w-100 h-100">
<div class="swiper heroSwiper w-100 h-100">
<div class="swiper-wrapper w-100 h-100">
<!-- Slide item -->
<div class="swiper-slide">
<article class="story-card-hero position-relative w-100 h-100">
<!-- Background Images - Responsive với ImgPicture -->
<div class="slide-bg-wrapper d-none d-lg-block">
<picture>
<source srcset="https://hatdaukhaai.com/media/sizes/slider/slider-44206-1771579690-150x150.webp 150w, https://hatdaukhaai.com/media/sizes/slider/slider-44206-1771579690-220x123.webp 220w, https://hatdaukhaai.com/media/sizes/slider/slider-44206-1771579690-299x167.webp 299w, https://hatdaukhaai.com/media/sizes/slider/slider-44206-1771579690-768x429.webp 768w, https://hatdaukhaai.com/media/sizes/slider/slider-44206-1771579690-1024x572.webp 1024w, https://hatdaukhaai.com/media/images/slider/slider-44206-1771579690.webp 2560w" type="image/webp" sizes="100vw">
<img src="https://hatdaukhaai.com/media/images/slider/slider-44206-1771579690.webp" alt="Chạy Trốn À? Bảo Bối, Nhốt Em Lại Có Được Không?" class="slide-bg">
</picture> </div>
<div class="slide-bg-wrapper d-block d-lg-none">
<picture>
<source srcset="https://hatdaukhaai.com/media/sizes/anh_truyen/edit-44206-1771432787-150x150.webp 150w, https://hatdaukhaai.com/media/sizes/anh_truyen/edit-44206-1771432787-220x330.webp 220w, https://hatdaukhaai.com/media/sizes/anh_truyen/edit-44206-1771432787-300x450.webp 300w, https://hatdaukhaai.com/media/images/anh_truyen/edit-44206-1771432787.webp 600w" type="image/webp" sizes="max(max-width: 375px) 220px">
<img src="https://hatdaukhaai.com/media/sizes/anh_truyen/edit-44206-1771432787-220x330.webp" alt="Chạy Trốn À? Bảo Bối, Nhốt Em Lại Có Được Không?" class="slide-bg-mobile">
</picture> </div>

<!-- Gradient Overlay -->
<!-- <div class="banner-black-bg-left"></div> -->
<!-- overlay header mobile -->
<div class="hdmobile-overlay-header-top"></div>
<div class="hdmobile-overlay-header-bottom"></div>

<!-- Content -->
<div class="slide-content p-3 pb-5 p-md-4 p-lg-5">
<h3 class="slide-title mb-2 mb-lg-3">Chạy Trốn À? Bảo Bối, Nhốt Em Lại Có Được Không?</h3>

<div class="slide-info">
<span class="rating">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:star-bold-duotone" class="star-icon"></iconify-icon>
5.0 </span>
<div class="tags">
<span class="tag">Hiện Đại</span><span class="tag">Ngôn Tình</span><span class="tag">HE</span> </div>
</div>

<p class="slide-description mb-2 mb-lg-3">
Nhà họ Nguyễn phá sản, Nguyễn Miên từ nhỏ được gửi nuôi ở nhà họ Thẩm.Vào ngày sinh nhật hai mươi tuổi của cô, Thẩm Vọng– người đã ra nước ngoài hai năm – đột nhiên trở về.Người thừa kế được nhà họ Th </p>

<div class="slide-controls">
<a href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/chay-tron-a-bao-boi-nhot-em-lai-co-duoc-khong" class="control-button read-button">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:book-2-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
Đọc Ngay </a>
<button type="button"
class="control-button bookmark-button"
title="Thêm vào yêu thích"
data-story-id="44206"
data-favorited="false">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:heart-linear"
style=""></iconify-icon>
Thích truyện
</button>
</div>
</div>
</article> </div>
<!-- Slide item -->
<div class="swiper-slide">
<article class="story-card-hero position-relative w-100 h-100">
<!-- Background Images - Responsive với ImgPicture -->
<div class="slide-bg-wrapper d-none d-lg-block">
<picture>

<script>
(function () {
function initHeroSwiper(heroEl) {
if (!heroEl || heroEl.classList.contains('swiper-initialized')) return null;
if (typeof Swiper === 'undefined') return null;

const isSmallViewport = window.matchMedia('(max-width: 991.98px)').matches;
const prefersReducedMotion = window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;
const enableAutoplay = !isSmallViewport && !prefersReducedMotion;

const swiperOptions = {
loop: !isSmallViewport,
effect: isSmallViewport ? 'slide' : 'fade',
// Mobile/Tablet init runs after window.load, so we can keep a non-zero speed for nicer swipe transitions.
speed: isSmallViewport ? 450 : 600,
autoplay: enableAutoplay ? {
delay: 5000,
disableOnInteraction: false,
pauseOnMouseEnter: true
} : false,
pagination: {
el: '.hero-slider-dots .swiper-pagination',
clickable: true,
dynamicBullets: false,
renderBullet: function (index, className) {
return '<button type="button" class="' + className + '" aria-label="Go to slide ' + (index + 1) + '"><span class="dot-progress"></span></button>';
}
},
navigation: {
nextEl: '.hero-nav-next',
prevEl: '.hero-nav-prev',
},
on: {
init: function () {
// Ensure we can target the "enhanced" state with CSS.
this.el.classList.add('swiper-initialized');
},
autoplayTimeLeft: function (s, time, progress) {
if (!enableAutoplay) return;
const activeBullet = s.pagination.el.querySelector('.swiper-pagination-bullet-active .dot-progress');
if (activeBullet) {
activeBullet.style.transform = 'scaleX(' + (1 - progress) + ')';
}
},
slideChange: function () {
if (!enableAutoplay) return;
const bullets = this.pagination.el.querySelectorAll('.dot-progress');
bullets.forEach(function (b) { b.style.transform = 'scaleX(0)'; });
}
}
};

if (!isSmallViewport) {
swiperOptions.fadeEffect = { crossFade: true };
}

const heroSwiper = new Swiper(heroEl, swiperOptions);

// Pause autoplay when the tab is not active (defensive: autoplay may be disabled)
document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', function () {
if (!heroSwiper || !heroSwiper.autoplay) return;
if (document.hidden) {
heroSwiper.autoplay.stop();
} else {
heroSwiper.autoplay.start();
}
});

// Expose for debugging if needed
window.hdkHeroSwiper = heroSwiper;
return heroSwiper;
}

function scheduleEnhance(heroEl, delayMode) {
const attempt = function () {
if (typeof Swiper === 'undefined') {
setTimeout(attempt, 100);
return;
}
initHeroSwiper(heroEl);
};

if (delayMode === 'idle' && 'requestIdleCallback' in window) {
requestIdleCallback(attempt, { timeout: 2500 });
} else if (delayMode === 'idle') {
setTimeout(attempt, 800);
} else {
setTimeout(attempt, 0);
}
}

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
const heroEl = document.querySelector('.heroSwiper');
if (!heroEl) return;

// If user swipes before enhancement, keep the native scroll-snap experience.
let userInteracted = false;
const markInteracted = function () { userInteracted = true; };
heroEl.addEventListener('touchstart', markInteracted, { passive: true });
heroEl.addEventListener('mousedown', markInteracted);
heroEl.addEventListener('scroll', function () {
if (heroEl.scrollLeft > 10) userInteracted = true;
}, { passive: true });

const isSmallViewport = window.matchMedia('(max-width: 991.98px)').matches;

if (isSmallViewport) {
// Mobile/Tablet: enhance only after full load to keep first paint instant (no animation).
window.addEventListener('load', function () {
if (userInteracted) return;
scheduleEnhance(heroEl, 'idle');
});
} else {
// Desktop: initialize ASAP to avoid hidden slide content (CSS relies on active classes).
scheduleEnhance(heroEl, 'fast');
}
});
})();
</script>

<link href="templates/css/hatdaukhaai/style-skeleton-truyen-noi-bat.css?ver=1774712994" rel="stylesheet">

<script>
(function() {
'use strict';
// Config
const AJAX_URL = 'https://hatdaukhaai.com/sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/load-truyen-noi-bat.php';
const SECTION_ID = 'featured-stories';
const CONTAINER_ID = 'hdk-featured-container';
const SWIPER_ID = 'hdk-featured-swiper';
// State
let featuredDataLoaded = false;
let featuredSwiper = null;
/**
* Initialize Swiper sau khi có data
*/
function initFeaturedSwiper() {
if (featuredSwiper) {
featuredSwiper.destroy(true, true);
}
featuredSwiper = new Swiper('#' + SWIPER_ID, {
// Basic Configuration
loop: true,
speed: 800,
effect: 'slide',
grabCursor: true,
watchSlidesProgress: true,
autoHeight: false, // Giữ chiều cao ổn định, không auto adjust
// Auto-play
autoplay: {
delay: 4000,
disableOnInteraction: false,
pauseOnMouseEnter: true
},
// Navigation
navigation: {
nextEl: '.hd-nav-next-compact',
prevEl: '.hd-nav-prev-compact'
},
// Pagination
pagination: {
el: '.hd-pagination-compact',
clickable: true,
dynamicBullets: true
},
// Optimized Responsive Breakpoints cho 12 items
breakpoints: {
320: {
slidesPerView: 3,
spaceBetween: 8,
slidesPerGroup: 3
},
480: {
slidesPerView: 4,
spaceBetween: 10,
slidesPerGroup: 4
},
768: {
slidesPerView: 5,
spaceBetween: 12,
slidesPerGroup: 5
},
992: {
slidesPerView: 6,
spaceBetween: 15,
slidesPerGroup: 6
},
1200: {
slidesPerView: 8,
spaceBetween: 18,
slidesPerGroup: 4
},
1400: {
slidesPerView: 8,
spaceBetween: 20,
slidesPerGroup: 5
}
}
});

// Ensure pagination geometry is recalculated after deferred styles load.
// This helps keep pagination bullets aligned when we enforce >= 48x48 tap targets via CSS.
setTimeout(function () {
if (featuredSwiper && typeof featuredSwiper.update === 'function') {
featuredSwiper.update();
}
}, 0);
window.addEventListener('load', function () {
if (featuredSwiper && typeof featuredSwiper.update === 'function') {
featuredSwiper.update();
}
}, { once: true });
}
/**
* Load truyện nổi bật qua AJAX
*/
function loadFeaturedStories() {
if (featuredDataLoaded) return;
featuredDataLoaded = true;
const container = document.getElementById(CONTAINER_ID);
if (!container) return;
fetch(AJAX_URL, {
method: 'POST',
headers: {
'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
}
})
.then(response => response.text())
.then(html => {
if (html && html.trim()) {
// Replace skeleton với real content
container.innerHTML = html;
// Add loaded class cho animation
const swiperEl = document.getElementById(SWIPER_ID);
if (swiperEl) {
swiperEl.classList.add('hdk-featured-loaded');
}
// Initialize Swiper sau khi có data (đợi DOM render xong)
requestAnimationFrame(() => {
setTimeout(() => {
initFeaturedSwiper();
// Force update layout sau khi init
if (featuredSwiper) {
featuredSwiper.update();
}
}, 150);
});
}
})
.catch(error => {
console.error('Error loading featured stories:', error);
// Keep skeleton visible on error
});
}
/**
* Intersection Observer để lazy load
*/
function initLazyLoad() {
const section = document.getElementById(SECTION_ID);
if (!section) return;
// Check nếu Intersection Observer được hỗ trợ
if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) {
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
entries.forEach(entry => {
if (entry.isIntersecting) {
loadFeaturedStories();
observer.disconnect();
}
});
}, {
rootMargin: '200px', // Load trước 200px khi scroll đến
threshold: 0.01
});
observer.observe(section);
} else {
// Fallback: Load ngay nếu không hỗ trợ Intersection Observer
loadFeaturedStories();
}
}
// Initialize Swiper cho skeleton ngay lập tức (để layout đúng)
function initSkeletonSwiper() {
if (!featuredSwiper) {
featuredSwiper = new Swiper('#' + SWIPER_ID, {
loop: false,
speed: 0,
autoplay: false,
navigation: false,
pagination: false,
breakpoints: {
320: { slidesPerView: 3, spaceBetween: 8 },
480: { slidesPerView: 4, spaceBetween: 10 },
768: { slidesPerView: 5, spaceBetween: 12 },
992: { slidesPerView: 6, spaceBetween: 15 },
1200: { slidesPerView: 8, spaceBetween: 18 },
1400: { slidesPerView: 8, spaceBetween: 20 }
}
});
}
}
// Initialize khi DOM ready
if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
initSkeletonSwiper();
initLazyLoad();
});
} else {
initSkeletonSwiper();
initLazyLoad();
}
// Compact Action Handlers (Event Delegation)
document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
// Bookmark functionality
if (e.target.closest('.hd-quick-bookmark')) {
e.preventDefault();
const btn = e.target.closest('.hd-quick-bookmark');
const icon = btn.querySelector('i');
if (icon && icon.classList.contains('far')) {
icon.classList.remove('far');
icon.classList.add('fas');
btn.style.color = '#ffc107';
} else if (icon) {
icon.classList.remove('fas');
icon.classList.add('far');
btn.style.color = '#54cfd6';
}
}
});
})();
</script>
<!-- truyện quảng bá -->

<!-- Promotional Stories Section - Modern Compact Design -->
<section class="hd-promotional-stories-section" id="promotional-stories">
<div class="container-fluid">
<!-- Section Header V2 - Modern Bold Design -->
<div class="hdk-section-header-v2 promo" id="hdk-promotional-header">
<div class="hdk-section-header-left">
<div class="hdk-section-icon-wrapper">
<iconify-icon id="hdk-promotional-icon-promo" icon="solar:rocket-2-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
<iconify-icon id="hdk-promotional-icon-suggest" icon="solar:stars-bold-duotone" style="display:none;"></iconify-icon>
</div>
<div class="hdk-section-text">
<h2 class="hdk-section-title-v2" id="hdk-promotional-title">Truyện Quảng Bá</h2>
<p class="hdk-section-subtitle-v2" id="hdk-promotional-subtitle">Khám phá những tác phẩm được đề xuất đặc biệt</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="hdk-section-header-right">
<a href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/danh-sach-truyen" class="hdk-view-all-v2">
Tất Cả
<iconify-icon icon="solar:arrow-right-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
</a>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Promotional Stories Grid -->
<div class="hd-promotional-container position-relative">
<div class="hd-promotional-slider swiper" id="hdk-promotional-swiper">
<div class="swiper-wrapper" id="hdk-promotional-container">
<!-- Skeleton Loading (hiển thị ban đầu) -->
<div class="swiper-slide hdk-promo-skeleton-slide">
<div class="hdk-promo-skeleton-card" aria-hidden="true"></div>
</div>
<div class="swiper-slide hdk-promo-skeleton-slide">
<div class="hdk-promo-skeleton-card" aria-hidden="true"></div>
</div>
<div class="swiper-slide hdk-promo-skeleton-slide">
<div class="hdk-promo-skeleton-card" aria-hidden="true"></div>
</div>
<div class="swiper-slide hdk-promo-skeleton-slide">
<div class="hdk-promo-skeleton-card" aria-hidden="true"></div>
</div>
<div class="swiper-slide hdk-promo-skeleton-slide">
<div class="hdk-promo-skeleton-card" aria-hidden="true"></div>
</div>
<div class="swiper-slide hdk-promo-skeleton-slide">
<div class="hdk-promo-skeleton-card" aria-hidden="true"></div>
</div>
<div class="swiper-slide hdk-promo-skeleton-slide">
<div class="hdk-promo-skeleton-card" aria-hidden="true"></div>
</div>
<div class="swiper-slide hdk-promo-skeleton-slide">
<div class="hdk-promo-skeleton-card" aria-hidden="true"></div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Pagination -->
<div class="hd-promotional-pagination mx-auto"></div>
</div>
<!-- Navigation -->
<div class="hd-promotional-nav hd-promotional-prev">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:alt-arrow-left-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
</div>
<div class="hd-promotional-nav hd-promotional-next">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:alt-arrow-right-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>

<link href="templates/css/hatdaukhaai/style-skeleton-truyen-quang-ba.css?ver=1774712994" rel="stylesheet">

<script>
(function() {
'use strict';

// Config
const AJAX_URL = 'https://hatdaukhaai.com/sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/load-truyen-quang-ba.php';
const SECTION_ID = 'promotional-stories';
const CONTAINER_ID = 'hdk-promotional-container';
const SWIPER_ID = 'hdk-promotional-swiper';

// State
let promoLoaded = false;
let promotionalSwiper = null;
let promoCountdownTimer = null;
let promoImageObserver = null;

function setHeaderVariant(isPromoSection) {
const headerEl = document.getElementById('hdk-promotional-header');
const titleEl = document.getElementById('hdk-promotional-title');
const subtitleEl = document.getElementById('hdk-promotional-subtitle');
const iconPromo = document.getElementById('hdk-promotional-icon-promo');
const iconSuggest = document.getElementById('hdk-promotional-icon-suggest');

if (!headerEl || !titleEl || !subtitleEl) return;

const isPromo = !!isPromoSection;
headerEl.classList.toggle('promo', isPromo);

if (iconPromo) iconPromo.style.display = isPromo ? '' : 'none';
if (iconSuggest) iconSuggest.style.display = isPromo ? 'none' : '';

if (isPromo) {
titleEl.textContent = 'Truyện Quảng Bá';
subtitleEl.textContent = 'Khám phá những tác phẩm được đề xuất đặc biệt';
} else {
titleEl.textContent = 'Gợi Ý Cho Bạn';
subtitleEl.textContent = 'Những truyện hay bạn có thể thích';
}
}

function updatePromoCountdowns() {
document.querySelectorAll('.hd-promo-countdown[data-end]').forEach(el => {
const endTime = parseInt(el.dataset.end, 10);
const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);
const remaining = Math.max(0, endTime - now);

if (!endTime || remaining === 0) {
el.style.display = 'none';
return;
}

const hours = Math.floor(remaining / 3600);
const minutes = Math.floor((remaining % 3600) / 60);
const countdownText = el.querySelector('.countdown-text');
if (countdownText) {
countdownText.textContent = `${hours}h ${minutes}m`;
}
});
}

function startPromoCountdownTimer() {
if (promoCountdownTimer) {
clearInterval(promoCountdownTimer);
promoCountdownTimer = null;
}
updatePromoCountdowns();
promoCountdownTimer = setInterval(updatePromoCountdowns, 60000);
}

function initPromoImageLazyLoad() {
// Reset old observer (nếu có)
if (promoImageObserver && typeof promoImageObserver.disconnect === 'function') {
promoImageObserver.disconnect();
}

const imgs = document.querySelectorAll('.hd-promo-cover img[data-src]');
if (!imgs.length) return;

// Fallback: không có IntersectionObserver -> load luôn
if (!('IntersectionObserver' in window)) {
imgs.forEach(img => {
if (img.dataset.src) {
img.src = img.dataset.src;
img.removeAttribute('data-src');
}
});
return;
}

promoImageObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
entries.forEach(entry => {
if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;
const img = entry.target;
if (img && img.dataset && img.dataset.src) {
img.src = img.dataset.src;
img.removeAttribute('data-src');
}
promoImageObserver.unobserve(img);
});
}, { rootMargin: '200px', threshold: 0.01 });

imgs.forEach(img => promoImageObserver.observe(img));
}

function initPromotionalSwiper() {
if (typeof Swiper === 'undefined') return;

// Destroy swiper cũ (skeleton) nếu có
if (promotionalSwiper) {
promotionalSwiper.destroy(true, true);
}

promotionalSwiper = new Swiper('#' + SWIPER_ID, {
// Basic Configuration
loop: true,
speed: 700,
effect: 'slide',
grabCursor: true,
watchSlidesProgress: true,

// Auto-play
autoplay: {
delay: 4000,
disableOnInteraction: false,
pauseOnMouseEnter: true
},

// Navigation
navigation: {
nextEl: '.hd-promotional-next',
prevEl: '.hd-promotional-prev'
},

// Pagination
pagination: {
el: '.hd-promotional-pagination',
clickable: true,
dynamicBullets: true
},

// Responsive Breakpoints - Mobile First (giữ như hiện tại)
breakpoints: {
320: { slidesPerView: 2, spaceBetween: 10, centeredSlides: false },
480: { slidesPerView: 3, spaceBetween: 12, centeredSlides: false },
768: { slidesPerView: 4, spaceBetween: 15, centeredSlides: false },
992: { slidesPerView: 5, spaceBetween: 18, centeredSlides: false },
1200: { slidesPerView: 6, spaceBetween: 20, centeredSlides: false },
1400: { slidesPerView: 8, spaceBetween: 20, centeredSlides: false }
}
});

// Ensure pagination geometry is recalculated after deferred styles load.
setTimeout(function () {
if (promotionalSwiper && typeof promotionalSwiper.update === 'function') {
promotionalSwiper.update();
}
}, 0);

if (document.readyState === 'complete') {
setTimeout(function () {
if (promotionalSwiper && typeof promotionalSwiper.update === 'function') {
promotionalSwiper.update();
}
}, 0);
} else {
window.addEventListener('load', function () {
if (promotionalSwiper && typeof promotionalSwiper.update === 'function') {
promotionalSwiper.update();
}
}, { once: true });
}
}

function initSkeletonSwiper() {
if (typeof Swiper === 'undefined') return;
if (promotionalSwiper) return;

promotionalSwiper = new Swiper('#' + SWIPER_ID, {
loop: false,
speed: 0,
autoplay: false,
navigation: false,
pagination: false,
breakpoints: {
320: { slidesPerView: 2, spaceBetween: 10 },
480: { slidesPerView: 3, spaceBetween: 12 },
768: { slidesPerView: 4, spaceBetween: 15 },
992: { slidesPerView: 5, spaceBetween: 18 },
1200: { slidesPerView: 6, spaceBetween: 20 },
1400: { slidesPerView: 8, spaceBetween: 20 }
}
});
}

function applyFadeIn() {
const container = document.getElementById(CONTAINER_ID);
if (!container) return;
container.querySelectorAll('.swiper-slide').forEach((slide, i) => {
slide.style.animationDelay = (i * 0.05) + 's';
slide.classList.add('hdk-promo-fade-in');
});
}

function loadPromotionalStories() {
if (promoLoaded) return;
promoLoaded = true;

const section = document.getElementById(SECTION_ID);
const container = document.getElementById(CONTAINER_ID);
if (!section || !container) return;

fetch(AJAX_URL, {
method: 'GET',
headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' }
})
.then(response => response.json())
.then(data => {
if (!data || data.status !== 'success') {
console.error('Load truyen quang ba error:', data);
return;
}

if (!data.html || !data.html.trim()) {
section.style.display = 'none';
return;
}

// Replace skeleton với content thật
container.innerHTML = data.html;
setHeaderVariant(!!data.is_promo_section);
applyFadeIn();
startPromoCountdownTimer();
initPromoImageLazyLoad();

// Init Swiper sau khi DOM render xong
requestAnimationFrame(() => {
setTimeout(() => {
initPromotionalSwiper();
if (promotionalSwiper && typeof promotionalSwiper.update === 'function') {
promotionalSwiper.update();
}
}, 150);
});
})
.catch(error => {
console.error('Load truyen quang ba error:', error);
});
}

function initLazyLoad() {
const section = document.getElementById(SECTION_ID);
if (!section) return;

if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) {
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
entries.forEach(entry => {
if (entry.isIntersecting) {
loadPromotionalStories();
observer.disconnect();
}
});
}, { rootMargin: '200px', threshold: 0.01 });

observer.observe(section);
} else {
loadPromotionalStories();
}
}

// Bookmark functionality cho card mới (.hd-promo-bookmark) - event delegation
document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
const btn = e.target.closest('.hd-promo-bookmark');
if (!btn) return;

e.preventDefault();
e.stopPropagation();

const icon = btn.querySelector('iconify-icon');
btn.classList.toggle('active');

if (icon) {
if (btn.classList.contains('active')) {
icon.setAttribute('icon', 'solar:heart-bold');
icon.style.color = '#ff6b6b';
} else {
icon.setAttribute('icon', 'solar:heart-linear');
icon.style.color = '';
}
}
});

// Init
if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
initSkeletonSwiper();
initLazyLoad();
});
} else {
initSkeletonSwiper();
initLazyLoad();
}
})();
</script>

<!-- mới cập nhật -->
<section class="section-moi-cap-nhat overflow-hidden">
<div class="container-fluid ">
<div class="row gx-4 gx-lg-5 gy-4">
<!-- LEFT COLUMN: TRUYỆN MỚI CẬP NHẬT (LAZY LOAD) -->
<div class="col-12 col-lg-8">
<div class="hdk-title-bar">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:history-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
<span class="hdk-title-bar-text">Truyện Mới Cập Nhật</span>
</div>

<!-- Container cho lazy load content -->
<div class="row list-stories" id="hdk-moi-cap-nhat-container">
<!-- Skeleton Loading (hiển thị ban đầu) -->
<div class="col-12 col-md-6 mb-3 hdk-skeleton-item">

</div>

<div class="col-12 col-md-6 mb-3 hdk-skeleton-item">

</div>
<div class="story-info">

</div>
<div class="col-12 col-md-6 mb-3 hdk-skeleton-item">

</div>

<!-- RIGHT COLUMN: REVIEWS & CATEGORIES (Server-side render) -->
<div class="col-12 col-lg-4">

<!-- Block 1: Đánh giá truyện (Latest Reviews từ db_danhgia) - Swiper Vertical -->
<div class="mb-4" id="hdk-review-list-section">
<div class="hdk-title-bar accent">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:star-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
<span class="hdk-title-bar-text">Đánh Giá Truyện</span>
</div>

<div class="swiper hdk-review-swiper">
<div class="swiper-wrapper">
<div class="swiper-slide">
<article class="review-item" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Review">
<!-- Schema.org Review - itemReviewed phải là direct child của Review -->

<!-- Schema.org Review - itemReviewed phải là direct child của Review -->
<meta itemprop="datePublished" content="2026-03-29">

<!-- Visual Content (không có microdata) -->
<div class="review-header">
<a href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/chong-tai-sinh-che-toi-toi-cuoi-linh-cuu-hoa-suong-qua" class="review-cover-wrapper position-relative" title="Chồng Tái Sinh Chê Tôi? Tôi Cưới Lính Cứu Hỏa, Sướng Quá">
<picture>
<source srcset="https://hatdaukhaai.com/media/sizes/anh_truyen/edit-45924-1774752064-150x150.webp 150w, https://hatdaukhaai.com/media/sizes/anh_truyen/edit-45924-1774752064-220x330.webp 220w, https://hatdaukhaai.com/media/sizes/anh_truyen/edit-45924-1774752064-300x450.webp 300w, https://hatdaukhaai.com/media/images/anh_truyen/edit-45924-1774752064.webp 600w" type="image/webp" sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 50vw">
<img src="https://hatdaukhaai.com/media/sizes/anh_truyen/edit-45924-1774752064-150x150.webp" alt="Chồng Tái Sinh Chê Tôi? Tôi Cưới Lính Cứu Hỏa, Sướng Quá" class="review-cover" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
</picture> </a>
<div class="review-user-info">
<a href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/chong-tai-sinh-che-toi-toi-cuoi-linh-cuu-hoa-suong-qua" class="review-story-name" title="Chồng Tái Sinh Chê Tôi? Tôi Cưới Lính Cứu Hỏa, Sướng Quá">

</a>
<a href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/tuong-nha/u_b82269349a613346a956647e" class="review-username">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:user-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
<span>tiểu mụi</span>
</a>
<div class="review-meta">
<div class="review-rating">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:star-bold-duotone" class="star-filled"></iconify-icon>
<iconify-icon icon="solar:star-bold-duotone" class="star-filled"></iconify-icon>
<iconify-icon icon="solar:star-bold-duotone" class="star-filled"></iconify-icon>
<iconify-icon icon="solar:star-bold-duotone" class="star-filled"></iconify-icon>
<iconify-icon icon="solar:star-bold-duotone" class="star-filled"></iconify-icon>
</div>
<span class="review-time">4 giờ trước</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</article>
</div>
<div class="swiper-slide">
<article class="review-item" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Review">
<!-- Schema.org Review - itemReviewed phải là direct child của Review -->
