</div>

<!-- Skeleton CSS -->
<link href="templates/css/hatdaukhaai/style-skeleton-moi-cap-nhat.css?ver=1774712994" rel="stylesheet">

<!-- Lazy Load Script với Intersection Observer -->
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
// =====================================================
// Lazy Load "Truyện Mới Cập Nhật" với Intersection Observer
// =====================================================
const container = document.getElementById('hdk-moi-cap-nhat-container');
let isLoaded = false;
function loadMoiCapNhat() {
if (isLoaded) return;
isLoaded = true;
fetch('https://hatdaukhaai.com/sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/load-moi-cap-nhat.php')
.then(response => response.text())
.then(html => {
// Replace skeleton với content thật
container.innerHTML = html;
// Add animation class
container.querySelectorAll('.col-12').forEach((col, i) => {
col.style.animationDelay = (i * 0.05) + 's';
col.classList.add('hdk-story-loaded');
});
})
.catch(error => {
console.error('Load moi cap nhat error:', error);
container.innerHTML = '<div class="col-12"><div class="alert alert-warning">Không thể tải dữ liệu. Vui lòng refresh trang.</div></div>';
});
}
// Intersection Observer - load khi section visible
if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) {
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
entries.forEach(entry => {
if (entry.isIntersecting) {
loadMoiCapNhat();
observer.disconnect();
}
});
}, {
rootMargin: '100px', // Load trước khi user scroll đến 100px
threshold: 0.1
});
observer.observe(container);
} else {
// Fallback cho browsers cũ - load ngay
loadMoiCapNhat();
}
// =====================================================
// Swiper cho Review List
// =====================================================
if (document.querySelector('.hdk-review-swiper')) {
new Swiper('.hdk-review-swiper', {
direction: 'vertical',
slidesPerView: 3,
spaceBetween: 10,
loop: true,
speed: 5000,
autoplay: {
delay: 0,
disableOnInteraction: false
},
freeMode: true,
freeModeMomentum: false,
allowTouchMove: true,
grabCursor: true,
on: {
init: function(swiper) {
const swiperContainer = swiper.el;
swiperContainer.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() {
swiper.autoplay.stop();
});
swiperContainer.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
swiper.autoplay.start();
});
}
}
});
}
});
</script>
<!-- truyện đang xu hướng -->
<!-- Truyện Đang Xu Hướng - Lazy Load + Pagination -->

<section class="hdk-trending-stories" id="trendingStoriesSection">
<div class="container-fluid">
<!-- Section Header V2 - Fire variant -->
<div class="hdk-section-header-v2 fire">
<div class="hdk-section-header-left">
<div class="hdk-section-icon-wrapper">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:fire-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
</div>
<div class="hdk-section-text">
<h2 class="hdk-section-title-v2"><span class="d-none d-sm-inline">Truyện </span>Đang Xu Hướng</h2>
<p class="hdk-section-subtitle-v2" id="trendingStoriesSubtitle">Truyện được đề xuất bởi Cộng Đồng</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="hdk-section-header-right">
<a href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/danh-sach-truyen" class="hdk-view-all-v2">
<span class="d-none d-sm-inline">Xem </span>tất cả
<iconify-icon icon="solar:arrow-right-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
</a>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Loading Indicator -->
<div class="hdk-trending-loading-overlay" id="trendingLoadingOverlay" style="display: none;">
<div class="hdk-trending-loading-spinner">
<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i>
<span>Đang tải...</span>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Stories Grid -->
<div class="hdk-trending-grid row row-cols-3 row-cols-sm-3 row-cols-md-4 row-cols-lg-5 row-cols-xl-6 g-2 g-md-3" id="trendingStoriesContainer">
<div class="col-12">
<div class="hdk-trending-empty-state text-center py-4">
<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin" style="font-size: 1.5rem; color: var(--hdk-primary);"></i>
<p class="text-muted mt-3 mb-0">Đang tải danh sách truyện xu hướng...</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Pagination -->
<div class="hdk-trending-pagination-wrapper" id="trendingPaginationWrapper"></div>
</div>
</section>

<link href="templates/css/hatdaukhaai/style-truyen-xu-huong.css?ver=1774712994" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="templates/js/hdk-page-jump.js" defer></script>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
const TrendingStoriesCtrl = {
currentPage: 1,
totalPages: 0,
totalStories: 0,
isLoading: false,
limit: 12,
storageKey: 'hdk_trending_stories_state',

init() {
this.bindEvents();
this.restoreState();
this.setupInitialLoad();
},

bindEvents() {
document.getElementById('trendingPaginationWrapper')?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
const btn = e.target.closest('.hy-page-btn');
if (btn && !btn.disabled) {
if (btn.dataset.action === 'jump' || btn.classList.contains('hy-page-jump')) {
this.promptJumpToPage();
return;
}
const page = parseInt(btn.dataset.page);
if (page && page !== this.currentPage) {
this.currentPage = page;
this.persistState();
this.syncUrl();
this.loadStories();
}
}
});
},

clampPage(page) {
const parsed = parseInt(page, 10);
if (!Number.isFinite(parsed) || parsed < 1) return 1;
if (Number.isFinite(this.totalPages) && this.totalPages > 0) {
return Math.min(parsed, this.totalPages);
}
return parsed;
},

getStateFromUrl() {
try {
const url = new URL(window.location.href);
if (!url.searchParams.has('t_page')) return null;
return {
page: this.clampPage(url.searchParams.get('t_page') || 1)
};
} catch (e) {
return null;
}
},

getStateFromStorage() {
try {
const raw = sessionStorage.getItem(this.storageKey);
if (!raw) return null;
const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object') return null;
return {
page: this.clampPage(parsed.page || 1)
};
} catch (e) {
return null;
}
},

persistState() {
try {
sessionStorage.setItem(this.storageKey, JSON.stringify({
page: this.currentPage,
ts: Date.now()
}));
} catch (e) {}
},

syncUrl() {
try {
const url = new URL(window.location.href);
if (this.currentPage > 1) url.searchParams.set('t_page', this.currentPage);
else url.searchParams.delete('t_page');
window.history.replaceState({ t_page: this.currentPage }, '', url);
} catch (e) {}
},

restoreState() {
const urlState = this.getStateFromUrl();
const savedState = this.getStateFromStorage();
const state = urlState || savedState;
if (!state) return;
this.currentPage = state.page;
this.persistState();
this.syncUrl();
},

setupInitialLoad() {
const needsAjax = this.currentPage > 1;

if (needsAjax) {
this.loadStories({ scroll: false });
return;
}

const section = document.getElementById('trendingStoriesSection');
const startLoad = () => this.loadStories({ scroll: false });

if (!section || !('IntersectionObserver' in window)) {
startLoad();
return;
}

const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
const entry = entries && entries[0];
if (entry && entry.isIntersecting) {
observer.disconnect();
startLoad();
}
}, { rootMargin: '250px 0px', threshold: 0.01 });

observer.observe(section);
},

updateSubtitle() {
const el = document.getElementById('trendingStoriesSubtitle');
if (!el) return;
if (this.totalStories > 0) {
el.textContent = new Intl.NumberFormat('vi-VN').format(this.totalStories) + ' truyện được đề xuất bởi Cộng Đồng';
}
},

promptJumpToPage() {
if (!this.totalPages || this.totalPages < 2) return;
const self = this;
if (typeof hdkPageJump !== 'undefined') {
hdkPageJump.show({
currentPage: this.currentPage,
totalPages: this.totalPages,
onSubmit: (page) => {
if (page === self.currentPage) return;
self.currentPage = page;
self.persistState();
self.syncUrl();
self.loadStories();
}
});
}
},

async loadStories(options = {}) {
if (this.isLoading) return;
this.isLoading = true;

const container = document.getElementById('trendingStoriesContainer');
const overlay = document.getElementById('trendingLoadingOverlay');
const paginationWrapper = document.getElementById('trendingPaginationWrapper');

if (overlay) overlay.style.display = 'flex';
container.style.opacity = '0.5';

try {
const params = new URLSearchParams({
page: this.currentPage,
limit: this.limit
});

const response = await fetch('https://hatdaukhaai.com/sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/load-truyen-xu-huong.php?' + params);
const data = await response.json();

if (data.status === 'success') {
if (data.hidden) {
document.getElementById('trendingStoriesSection').style.display = 'none';
return;
}

container.innerHTML = data.html;

if (paginationWrapper) {
paginationWrapper.innerHTML = data.pagination || '';
}

if (data.current_page) {
this.currentPage = this.clampPage(data.current_page);
}

this.totalPages = data.total_pages || 0;
this.totalStories = data.total || 0;
this.updateSubtitle();
this.persistState();
this.syncUrl();

if (options.scroll !== false) {
document.getElementById('trendingStoriesSection')?.scrollIntoView({
behavior: 'smooth',
block: 'start'
});
}

container.querySelectorAll('.hdk-trending-col:not(.loaded)').forEach((col, i) => {
col.classList.add('loaded');
col.style.animation = 'fadeInUp 0.4s ease-out ' + (i * 0.05) + 's both';
});

if (data.schema_json) {
let existing = document.getElementById('trendingStoriesSchema');
if (existing) existing.remove();
const script = document.createElement('script');
script.type = 'application/ld+json';
script.id = 'trendingStoriesSchema';
script.textContent = data.schema_json;
document.head.appendChild(script);
}

} else {
console.error('Trending load error:', data.message);
if (typeof FuiToast !== 'undefined') {
FuiToast.error(data.message || 'Có lỗi xảy ra');
}
}
} catch (error) {
console.error('Trending AJAX error:', error);
if (typeof FuiToast !== 'undefined') {
FuiToast.error('Không thể tải dữ liệu');
}
} finally {
this.isLoading = false;
if (overlay) overlay.style.display = 'none';
container.style.opacity = '1';
}
}
};

TrendingStoriesCtrl.init();
});
</script>
<!-- truyện hoàn thành -->
<!-- Truyện Hoàn Thành - Mobile-First Design với Data thực từ DB -->

<section class="hy-completed-stories" id="completedStoriesSection">
<div class="container-fluid">
<!-- Section Header V2 - Modern Bold Design -->
<div class="hdk-section-header-v2 success">
<div class="hdk-section-header-left">
<div class="hdk-section-icon-wrapper">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:check-circle-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
</div>
<div class="hdk-section-text">
<h2 class="hdk-section-title-v2"><span class="d-none d-sm-inline">Truyện </span>Đã Hoàn Thành</h2>
<p class="hdk-section-subtitle-v2" id="completedStoriesSubtitle">Danh sách truyện đã kết thúc trọn vẹn</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="hdk-section-header-right">
<a href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/danh-sach-truyen?status=2" class="hdk-view-all-v2">
<span class="d-none d-sm-inline">Xem </span>tất cả
<iconify-icon icon="solar:arrow-right-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
</a>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Filter & Sort Controls -->
<div class="hdk-filter-bar flex-nowrap">
<div class="hdk-filter-group">
<div class="hdk-filter-item">
<label for="genreFilter" class="hdk-filter-label">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:tag-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
Thể loại
</label>
<select class="hdk-filter-select" id="genreFilter">
<option value="">Tất cả</option>
<option value="ngon-tinh">Ngôn Tình</option>
<option value="dam-my">Đam Mỹ</option>
<option value="bach-hop">Bách Hợp</option>
<option value="tien-hiep">Tiên Hiệp</option>
<option value="nu-cuong">Nữ Cường</option>
<option value="huyen-huyen">Huyền Huyễn</option>
<option value="kiem-hiep">Kiếm Hiệp</option>
<option value="co-dai">Cổ Đại</option>
<option value="hien-dai">Hiện Đại</option>
<option value="do-thi">Đô Thị</option>
<option value="xuyen-khong">Xuyên Không</option>
<option value="xuyen-nhanh">Xuyên Nhanh</option>
<option value="trong-sinh">Trọng Sinh</option>
<option value="khoa-huyen">Khoa Huyễn</option>
<option value="he-thong">Hệ Thống</option>
<option value="vong-du">Võng Du</option>
<option value="mat-the">Mạt Thế</option>
<option value="trinh-tham">Trinh Thám</option>
<option value="linh-di">Linh Dị</option>
<option value="kinh-di">Kinh Dị</option>
<option value="hai-huoc">Hài Hước</option>
</select>
</div>
<div class="hdk-filter-item">
<label for="sortOrder" class="hdk-filter-label">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:sort-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
Sắp xếp
</label>
<select class="hdk-filter-select" id="sortOrder">
<option value="completion_date">Mới hoàn thành</option>
<option value="views">Nhiều lượt đọc</option>
<option value="chapters">Nhiều chương</option>
<option value="rating">Được yêu thích</option>
</select>
</div>
</div>
<div class="hdk-view-toggles">
<button class="hdk-view-btn active" data-view="grid" title="Hiển thị dạng lưới">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:widget-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
</button>
<button class="hdk-view-btn" data-view="list" title="Hiển thị dạng danh sách">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:list-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
</button>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Loading Indicator -->
<div class="hy-loading-overlay" id="loadingOverlay" style="display: none;">
<div class="hy-loading-spinner">
<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i>
<span>Đang tải...</span>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Stories Grid -->
<div class="hy-stories-container row row-cols-3 row-cols-sm-3 row-cols-md-4 row-cols-lg-5 row-cols-xl-6 g-2 g-md-3" id="storiesContainer">
<div class="col-12">
<div class="hy-empty-state text-center py-4">
<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin" style="font-size: 1.5rem; color: var(--hdk-primary);"></i>
<p class="text-muted mt-3 mb-0">Đang tải danh sách truyện hoàn thành...</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Pagination Desktop -->
<div class="hy-pagination-wrapper" id="paginationWrapper"></div>

</div>
</section>

<link href="templates/css/hatdaukhaai/style-truyen-hoan-thanh.css?ver=1774712994" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="templates/js/hdk-page-jump.js" defer></script>

<!-- JavaScript cho Completed Stories Interface -->
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
// Completed Stories Controller
const CompletedStoriesCtrl = {
currentPage: 1,
totalPages: 0,
totalStories: 0,
hasSsrData: false,
currentGenre: '',
currentSort: 'completion_date',
currentView: 'grid',
isLoading: false,
limit: 12,
storageKey: 'hdk_completed_stories_state',

init() {
this.bindEvents();
this.restoreState();
this.setupInitialLoad();
},

bindEvents() {
// Filter controls
const genreFilter = document.getElementById('genreFilter');
const sortOrder = document.getElementById('sortOrder');

if (genreFilter) {
genreFilter.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
this.currentGenre = e.target.value;
this.currentPage = 1;
this.persistState();
this.syncUrl();
this.loadStories(false);
});
}

if (sortOrder) {
sortOrder.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
this.currentSort = e.target.value;
this.currentPage = 1;
this.persistState();
this.syncUrl();
this.loadStories(false);
});
}

// View toggles
document.querySelectorAll('.hdk-view-btn').forEach(btn => {
btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
this.toggleView(e.target.closest('.hdk-view-btn'));
});
});

// Pagination - Event delegation
document.getElementById('paginationWrapper')?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
const btn = e.target.closest('.hy-page-btn');
if (btn && !btn.disabled) {
if (btn.dataset.action === 'jump' || btn.classList.contains('hy-page-jump')) {
this.promptJumpToPage();
return;
}
const page = parseInt(btn.dataset.page);
if (page && page !== this.currentPage) {
this.currentPage = page;
this.persistState();
this.syncUrl();
this.loadStories(false);
}
}
});

},

clampPage(page) {
const parsed = parseInt(page, 10);
if (!Number.isFinite(parsed) || parsed < 1) return 1;
if (Number.isFinite(this.totalPages) && this.totalPages > 0) {
return Math.min(parsed, this.totalPages);
}
return parsed;
},

getStateFromUrl() {
try {
const url = new URL(window.location.href);
const hasAny =
url.searchParams.has('page') ||
url.searchParams.has('genre') ||
url.searchParams.has('sort') ||
url.searchParams.has('view');

if (!hasAny) return null;

return {
page: this.clampPage(url.searchParams.get('page') || 1),
genre: url.searchParams.get('genre') || '',
sort: url.searchParams.get('sort') || 'completion_date',
view: url.searchParams.get('view') || 'grid'
};
} catch (e) {
return null;
}
},

getStateFromStorage() {
try {
const raw = sessionStorage.getItem(this.storageKey);
if (!raw) return null;
const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object') return null;
return {
page: this.clampPage(parsed.page || 1),
genre: typeof parsed.genre === 'string' ? parsed.genre : '',
sort: typeof parsed.sort === 'string' ? parsed.sort : 'completion_date',
view: typeof parsed.view === 'string' ? parsed.view : 'grid'
};
} catch (e) {
return null;
}
},

persistState() {
try {
sessionStorage.setItem(this.storageKey, JSON.stringify({
page: this.currentPage,
genre: this.currentGenre,
sort: this.currentSort,
view: this.currentView,
ts: Date.now()
}));
} catch (e) {}
},

syncUrl() {
try {
const url = new URL(window.location.href);

if (this.currentPage > 1) url.searchParams.set('page', this.currentPage);
else url.searchParams.delete('page');

if (this.currentGenre) url.searchParams.set('genre', this.currentGenre);
else url.searchParams.delete('genre');

if (this.currentSort && this.currentSort !== 'completion_date') url.searchParams.set('sort', this.currentSort);
else url.searchParams.delete('sort');

if (this.currentView && this.currentView !== 'grid') url.searchParams.set('view', this.currentView);
else url.searchParams.delete('view');

window.history.replaceState({
page: this.currentPage,
genre: this.currentGenre,
sort: this.currentSort,
view: this.currentView
}, '', url);
} catch (e) {}
},

applyViewMode() {
const storiesContainer = document.getElementById('storiesContainer');
const viewToggles = document.querySelectorAll('.hdk-view-btn');
viewToggles.forEach(btn => btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.view === this.currentView));

if (!storiesContainer) return;

if (this.currentView === 'list') {
storiesContainer.classList.add('list-view');
storiesContainer.classList.remove('row-cols-2', 'row-cols-sm-3', 'row-cols-md-4', 'row-cols-lg-5', 'row-cols-xl-6');
storiesContainer.classList.add('row-cols-1');
} else {
storiesContainer.classList.remove('list-view', 'row-cols-1');
storiesContainer.classList.add('row-cols-2', 'row-cols-sm-3', 'row-cols-md-4', 'row-cols-lg-5', 'row-cols-xl-6');
}
},

restoreState() {
const urlState = this.getStateFromUrl();
const savedState = this.getStateFromStorage();
const state = urlState || savedState;
if (!state) return;

this.currentPage = state.page;
this.currentGenre = state.genre;
this.currentSort = state.sort;
this.currentView = state.view;

const genreFilter = document.getElementById('genreFilter');
const sortOrder = document.getElementById('sortOrder');
if (genreFilter) genreFilter.value = this.currentGenre;
if (sortOrder) sortOrder.value = this.currentSort;

this.applyViewMode();
this.persistState();
this.syncUrl();
},

setupInitialLoad() {
const needsAjax =
this.currentPage > 1 ||
this.currentGenre ||
this.currentSort !== 'completion_date' ||
this.currentView !== 'grid';

if (needsAjax) {
this.loadStories(false, { scroll: false });
return;
}

if (this.hasSsrData) return;

const section = document.getElementById('completedStoriesSection');
const startLoad = () => this.loadStories(false, { scroll: false });

if (!section || !('IntersectionObserver' in window)) {
startLoad();
return;
}

const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
const entry = entries && entries[0];
if (entry && entry.isIntersecting) {
observer.disconnect();
startLoad();
}
}, { rootMargin: '250px 0px', threshold: 0.01 });

observer.observe(section);
},

updateSubtitle() {
const el = document.getElementById('completedStoriesSubtitle');
if (!el) return;
if (this.totalStories && this.totalStories > 0) {
el.textContent = new Intl.NumberFormat('vi-VN').format(this.totalStories) + ' truyện đã kết thúc trọn vẹn';
}
},

promptJumpToPage() {
if (!this.totalPages || this.totalPages < 2) return;

const self = this;
hdkPageJump.show({
currentPage: this.currentPage,
totalPages: this.totalPages,
onSubmit: (page) => {
if (page === self.currentPage) return;
self.currentPage = page;
self.persistState();
self.syncUrl();
self.loadStories(false);
}
});
},

// Toggle view (grid/list)
toggleView(clickedBtn) {
const viewToggles = document.querySelectorAll('.hdk-view-btn');
const storiesContainer = document.getElementById('storiesContainer');

viewToggles.forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('active'));
clickedBtn.classList.add('active');

const viewType = clickedBtn.dataset.view;
this.currentView = viewType;

if (viewType === 'list') {
storiesContainer.classList.add('list-view');
storiesContainer.classList.remove('row-cols-2', 'row-cols-sm-3', 'row-cols-md-4', 'row-cols-lg-5', 'row-cols-xl-6');
storiesContainer.classList.add('row-cols-1');
} else {
storiesContainer.classList.remove('list-view', 'row-cols-1');
storiesContainer.classList.add('row-cols-2', 'row-cols-sm-3', 'row-cols-md-4', 'row-cols-lg-5', 'row-cols-xl-6');
}

// Reload với view mới
this.persistState();
this.syncUrl();
this.loadStories(false);

// Micro-interaction
clickedBtn.style.transform = 'scale(0.9)';
setTimeout(() => {
clickedBtn.style.transform = 'scale(1)';
}, 150);
},

// Load stories via AJAX
async loadStories(append = false, options = {}) {
if (this.isLoading) return;
this.isLoading = true;

const storiesContainer = document.getElementById('storiesContainer');
const loadingOverlay = document.getElementById('loadingOverlay');
const paginationWrapper = document.getElementById('paginationWrapper');

// Show loading
if (loadingOverlay) loadingOverlay.style.display = 'flex';
if (!append) storiesContainer.style.opacity = '0.5';

try {
const params = new URLSearchParams({
genre: this.currentGenre,
sort: this.currentSort,
page: this.currentPage,
limit: this.limit,
view: this.currentView
});

const response = await fetch(`https://hatdaukhaai.com/sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/load-truyen-hoan-thanh.php?${params}`);
const data = await response.json();

if (data.status === 'success') {
// Replace stories
storiesContainer.innerHTML = data.html;
// Update pagination
if (paginationWrapper) {
paginationWrapper.innerHTML = data.pagination;
}

// Sync page (server may clamp)
if (data.current_page) {
this.currentPage = this.clampPage(data.current_page);
}

// Update state
this.totalPages = data.total_pages;
this.totalStories = data.total;
this.updateSubtitle();

this.persistState();
this.syncUrl();

// Scroll to section on page change
if (options.scroll !== false) {
document.getElementById('completedStoriesSection')?.scrollIntoView({
behavior: 'smooth',
block: 'start'
});
}

// Re-apply view mode
if (this.currentView === 'list') {
storiesContainer.classList.add('list-view', 'row-cols-1');
storiesContainer.classList.remove('row-cols-2', 'row-cols-sm-3', 'row-cols-md-4', 'row-cols-lg-5', 'row-cols-xl-6');
}

// Add fade-in animation to new items
storiesContainer.querySelectorAll('.hy-story-col:not(.loaded)').forEach((col, i) => {
col.classList.add('loaded');
col.style.animation = `fadeInUp 0.4s ease-out ${i * 0.05}s both`;
});

} else {
console.error('Load error:', data.message);
if (typeof FuiToast !== 'undefined') {
FuiToast.error(data.message || 'Có lỗi xảy ra');
}
}

} catch (error) {
console.error('AJAX error:', error);
if (typeof FuiToast !== 'undefined') {
FuiToast.error('Không thể tải dữ liệu');
}
} finally {
this.isLoading = false;
if (loadingOverlay) loadingOverlay.style.display = 'none';
storiesContainer.style.opacity = '1';
}
},

};

// Initialize
CompletedStoriesCtrl.init();
});
</script>
<!-- bảng xếp hạng -->

<section class="hd-ranking-section pt-0 pb-lg-5">
<div class="container-fluid">
<!-- Bảng xếp hạng với 2 cột -->
<div class="hd-ranking-content-wrapper">
<div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-lg-2 g-4">
<!-- ========== CỘT 1: BẢNG XẾP HẠNG TRUYỆN ========== -->
<div class="col">
<div class="hd-ranking-card">
<!-- Section Header V2 -->
<div class="hdk-section-header-v2 crown">
<div class="hdk-section-header-left">
<div class="hdk-section-icon-wrapper">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:crown-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
</div>
<div class="hdk-section-text">
<h2 class="hdk-section-title-v2">Bảng Xếp Hạng</h2>
<p class="hdk-section-subtitle-v2">Truyện được đọc nhiều nhất</p>
</div>
</div>
<!-- Genre Filter Dropdown (Modern) -->
<div class="hdk-section-header-right">
<div class="hdk-genre-dropdown" id="hdk-genre-dropdown">
<button type="button" class="hdk-genre-trigger" id="hdk-genre-trigger" aria-haspopup="listbox" aria-expanded="false">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:tag-bold-duotone" class="hdk-genre-icon"></iconify-icon>
<span class="hdk-genre-label" id="hdk-genre-label">Tất cả</span>
<iconify-icon icon="solar:alt-arrow-down-linear" class="hdk-genre-chevron"></iconify-icon>
</button>
<div class="hdk-genre-menu" id="hdk-genre-menu" role="listbox" aria-label="Chọn thể loại">
<div class="hdk-genre-menu-inner vh-scrollbar">
<div class="hdk-genre-option active" data-value="all" role="option" aria-selected="true">
<span class="hdk-genre-option-text">Tất cả thể loại</span>
<iconify-icon icon="solar:check-circle-bold" class="hdk-genre-check"></iconify-icon>
</div>
<div class="hdk-genre-option" data-value="tien-hiep" role="option" aria-selected="false">
<span class="hdk-genre-option-text">Tiên Hiệp</span>
<iconify-icon icon="solar:check-circle-bold" class="hdk-genre-check"></iconify-icon>
</div>
<div class="hdk-genre-option" data-value="kiem-hiep" role="option" aria-selected="false">
<span class="hdk-genre-option-text">Kiếm Hiệp</span>
<iconify-icon icon="solar:check-circle-bold" class="hdk-genre-check"></iconify-icon>
</div>
<div class="hdk-genre-option" data-value="huyen-huyen" role="option" aria-selected="false">
<span class="hdk-genre-option-text">Huyền Huyễn</span>
<iconify-icon icon="solar:check-circle-bold" class="hdk-genre-check"></iconify-icon>
</div>
<div class="hdk-genre-option" data-value="ky-ao" role="option" aria-selected="false">
<span class="hdk-genre-option-text">Kỳ Ảo</span>
<iconify-icon icon="solar:check-circle-bold" class="hdk-genre-check"></iconify-icon>
</div>
<div class="hdk-genre-option" data-value="tu-tien" role="option" aria-selected="false">
<span class="hdk-genre-option-text">Tu Tiên</span>
<iconify-icon icon="solar:check-circle-bold" class="hdk-genre-check"></iconify-icon>
</div>

</div>

<!-- Tabs cho các period -->
<div class="hd-ranking-tabs mb-3">
<ul class="nav nav-pills hd-ranking-nav" role="tablist" id="story-ranking-tabs">
<li class="nav-item" role="presentation">
<button class="nav-link active"
data-period="ngay" type="button" role="tab">Ngày</button>
</li>
<li class="nav-item" role="presentation">
<button class="nav-link "
data-period="tuan" type="button" role="tab">Tuần</button>
</li>
<li class="nav-item" role="presentation">
<button class="nav-link "
data-period="thang" type="button" role="tab">Tháng</button>
</li>
<li class="nav-item" role="presentation">
<button class="nav-link "
data-period="nam" type="button" role="tab">Năm</button>
</li>
<li class="nav-item" role="presentation">
<button class="nav-link "
data-period="all" type="button" role="tab">Tất cả</button>
</li>
</ul>
</div>

<!-- Container hiển thị danh sách truyện -->
<div class="hd-ranking-content">
<div class="hd-ranking-list" id="hd-ranking-list">
<!-- Loading skeleton -->
<div class="hd-ranking-loading"><div class="hd-ranking-item-skeleton"><div class="skeleton-rank"></div><div class="skeleton-cover"></div><div class="skeleton-info"><div class="skeleton-title"></div><div class="skeleton-meta"></div></div></div><div class="hd-ranking-item-skeleton"><div class="skeleton-rank"></div><div class="skeleton-cover"></div><div class="skeleton-info"><div class="skeleton-title"></div><div class="skeleton-meta"></div></div></div><div class="hd-ranking-item-skeleton"><div class="skeleton-rank"></div><div class="skeleton-cover"></div><div class="skeleton-info"><div class="skeleton-title"></div><div class="skeleton-meta"></div></div></div><div class="hd-ranking-item-skeleton"><div class="skeleton-rank"></div><div class="skeleton-cover"></div><div class="skeleton-info"><div class="skeleton-title"></div><div class="skeleton-meta"></div></div></div><div class="hd-ranking-item-skeleton"><div class="skeleton-rank"></div><div class="skeleton-cover"></div><div class="skeleton-info"><div class="skeleton-title"></div><div class="skeleton-meta"></div></div></div></div> </div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- ========== CỘT 2: VINH DANH DỊCH GIẢ ========== -->
<div class="col">
<div class="hd-ranking-card">
<!-- Section Header V2 -->
<div class="hdk-section-header-v2 special">
<div class="hdk-section-header-left">
<div class="hdk-section-icon-wrapper">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:medal-ribbons-star-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
</div>
<div class="hdk-section-text">
<h2 class="hdk-section-title-v2">Vinh Danh Dịch Giả</h2>
<p class="hdk-section-subtitle-v2">Những dịch giả được yêu thích nhất</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Tabs cho các period -->
<div class="hd-ranking-tabs mb-3">
<ul class="nav nav-pills hd-ranking-nav" role="tablist" id="translator-ranking-tabs">
<li class="nav-item" role="presentation">
<button class="nav-link active"
data-period="ngay" type="button" role="tab">Ngày</button>
</li>
<li class="nav-item" role="presentation">
<button class="nav-link "
data-period="tuan" type="button" role="tab">Tuần</button>
</li>
<li class="nav-item" role="presentation">
<button class="nav-link "
data-period="thang" type="button" role="tab">Tháng</button>
</li>
<li class="nav-item" role="presentation">
<button class="nav-link "
data-period="nam" type="button" role="tab">Năm</button>
</li>
<li class="nav-item" role="presentation">
<button class="nav-link "
data-period="all" type="button" role="tab">Tất cả</button>
</li>
</ul>
</div>

<!-- Container hiển thị danh sách dịch giả -->
<div class="hd-translator-ranking-content">
<div class="hd-translator-list" id="hd-translator-list">
<!-- Loading skeleton -->
<div class="hd-translator-loading"><div class="hd-translator-skeleton"><div class="skeleton-avatar"></div><div class="skeleton-info"><div class="skeleton-name"></div><div class="skeleton-stats"></div></div></div><div class="hd-translator-skeleton"><div class="skeleton-avatar"></div><div class="skeleton-info"><div class="skeleton-name"></div><div class="skeleton-stats"></div></div></div><div class="hd-translator-skeleton"><div class="skeleton-avatar"></div><div class="skeleton-info"><div class="skeleton-name"></div><div class="skeleton-stats"></div></div></div><div class="hd-translator-skeleton"><div class="skeleton-avatar"></div><div class="skeleton-info"><div class="skeleton-name"></div><div class="skeleton-stats"></div></div></div><div class="hd-translator-skeleton"><div class="skeleton-avatar"></div><div class="skeleton-info"><div class="skeleton-name"></div><div class="skeleton-stats"></div></div></div><div class="hd-translator-skeleton"><div class="skeleton-avatar"></div><div class="skeleton-info"><div class="skeleton-name"></div><div class="skeleton-stats"></div></div></div></div> </div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>


<link href="templates/css/hatdaukhaai/style-bang-xep-hang.css?ver=1774712992" rel="stylesheet">
<link href="templates/css/hatdaukhaai/style-bang-xep-hang-genre-filter.css?ver=1774712992" rel="stylesheet">

<script>
(function() {
// ========== CONFIG ==========
const RANKING_LIMIT = 10;
const TRANSLATOR_LIMIT = 10;
const SKELETON_DELAY = 200; // ms để skeleton hiển thị lâu hơn
const BASE_URL = 'https://hatdaukhaai.com/';
// ========== STORY RANKING ==========
const rankingList = document.getElementById('hd-ranking-list');
// Only period tabs (exclude genre pill)
const storyTabs = document.querySelectorAll('#story-ranking-tabs button.nav-link[data-period]');
let currentStoryPeriod = 'ngay';
// ========== CUSTOM GENRE DROPDOWN ==========
const genreDropdown = document.getElementById('hdk-genre-dropdown');
const genreTrigger = document.getElementById('hdk-genre-trigger');
const genreMenu = document.getElementById('hdk-genre-menu');
const genreLabel = document.getElementById('hdk-genre-label');
const genreOptions = document.querySelectorAll('.hdk-genre-option');
let currentStoryGenre = 'all';
let isDropdownOpen = false;

// Toggle dropdown
function toggleGenreDropdown(forceClose = false) {
if (forceClose || isDropdownOpen) {
genreDropdown.classList.remove('is-open');
genreTrigger.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
isDropdownOpen = false;
} else {
genreDropdown.classList.add('is-open');
genreTrigger.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
isDropdownOpen = true;
}
}

// Trigger click
if (genreTrigger) {
genreTrigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
e.stopPropagation();
toggleGenreDropdown();
});
}

// Close on click outside
document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
if (isDropdownOpen && genreDropdown && !genreDropdown.contains(e.target)) {
toggleGenreDropdown(true);
}
});

// Close on Escape key
document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
if (e.key === 'Escape' && isDropdownOpen) {
toggleGenreDropdown(true);
genreTrigger?.focus();
}
});

// Option click handler
genreOptions.forEach(option => {
option.addEventListener('click', function() {
const value = this.dataset.value || 'all';
const text = this.querySelector('.hdk-genre-option-text')?.textContent || 'Tất cả';
if (value === currentStoryGenre) {
toggleGenreDropdown(true);
return;
}

// Update active state
genreOptions.forEach(opt => {
opt.classList.remove('active');
opt.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'false');
});
this.classList.add('active');
this.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'true');

// Update trigger label
if (genreLabel) {
genreLabel.textContent = value === 'all' ? 'Tất cả' : text;
}

// Update dropdown state
genreDropdown.classList.toggle('has-selection', value !== 'all');

// Update current genre and reload
currentStoryGenre = value;
toggleGenreDropdown(true);
loadStoryRanking(currentStoryPeriod);
});
});

// Load story ranking data - trả về HTML
async function loadStoryRanking(period, showSkeleton = true) {
if (!rankingList) return;

// Hiện skeleton
if (showSkeleton) {
rankingList.innerHTML = getStoryLoadingSkeleton();
}

try {
// Delay để skeleton hiện lâu hơn
await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, SKELETON_DELAY));
const url = `${BASE_URL}sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/get-ranking.php?period=${encodeURIComponent(period)}&limit=${RANKING_LIMIT}&genre=${encodeURIComponent(currentStoryGenre)}`;
const response = await fetch(url);
const html = await response.text();
rankingList.innerHTML = html;
} catch (error) {
console.error('Error loading story ranking:', error);
rankingList.innerHTML = getStoryEmptyState(period);
}
}

// Get story loading skeleton HTML
function getStoryLoadingSkeleton() {
let html = '<div class="hd-ranking-loading">';
for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
html += `
<div class="hd-ranking-item-skeleton">
<div class="skeleton-rank"></div>
<div class="skeleton-cover"></div>
<div class="skeleton-info">
<div class="skeleton-title"></div>
<div class="skeleton-meta"></div>
</div>
</div>
`;
}
html += '</div>';
return html;
}

// Get story empty state HTML (fallback)
function getStoryEmptyState(period) {
const periodLabels = {
'ngay': 'hôm nay',
'tuan': 'tuần này',
'thang': 'tháng này',
'nam': 'năm nay',
'all': ''
};
const label = periodLabels[period] || '';
return `
<div class="hd-ranking-empty">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:chart-2-bold-duotone" width="48"></iconify-icon>
<p>Chưa có dữ liệu bảng xếp hạng${label ? ' ' + label : ''}.</p>
</div>
`;
}

// Story tab click handler
storyTabs.forEach(tab => {
tab.addEventListener('click', function() {
const period = this.dataset.period;
if (period === currentStoryPeriod) return;

storyTabs.forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
this.classList.add('active');

currentStoryPeriod = period;
loadStoryRanking(period);
});
});

// ========== TRANSLATOR RANKING ==========
const translatorList = document.getElementById('hd-translator-list');
const translatorTabs = document.querySelectorAll('#translator-ranking-tabs button.nav-link[data-period]');
let currentTranslatorPeriod = 'ngay';

// Load translator ranking data - trả về HTML
async function loadTranslatorRanking(period, showSkeleton = true) {
if (!translatorList) return;

// Hiện skeleton
if (showSkeleton) {
translatorList.innerHTML = getTranslatorLoadingSkeleton();
}

try {
// Delay để skeleton hiện lâu hơn
await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, SKELETON_DELAY));
const response = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/get-translator-ranking.php?period=${period}&limit=${TRANSLATOR_LIMIT}`);
const html = await response.text();
translatorList.innerHTML = html;
} catch (error) {
console.error('Error loading translator ranking:', error);
translatorList.innerHTML = getTranslatorEmptyState(period);
}
}

// Get translator loading skeleton HTML
function getTranslatorLoadingSkeleton() {
let html = '<div class="hd-translator-loading">';
for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
html += `
<div class="hd-translator-skeleton">
<div class="skeleton-avatar"></div>
<div class="skeleton-info">
<div class="skeleton-name"></div>
<div class="skeleton-stats"></div>
</div>
</div>
`;
}
html += '</div>';
return html;
}

// Get translator empty state HTML (fallback)
function getTranslatorEmptyState(period) {
const periodLabels = {
'ngay': 'hôm nay',
'tuan': 'tuần này',
'thang': 'tháng này',
'nam': 'năm nay',
'all': ''
};
const label = periodLabels[period] || '';
return `
<div class="hd-ranking-empty">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:users-group-rounded-bold-duotone" width="48"></iconify-icon>
<p>Chưa có dữ liệu vinh danh dịch giả${label ? ' ' + label : ''}.</p>
</div>
`;
}

// Translator tab click handler
translatorTabs.forEach(tab => {
tab.addEventListener('click', function() {
const period = this.dataset.period;
if (period === currentTranslatorPeriod) return;

translatorTabs.forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
this.classList.add('active');

currentTranslatorPeriod = period;
loadTranslatorRanking(period);
});
});

// ========== INITIAL LOAD - Use IntersectionObserver for lazy loading ==========
let rankingLoaded = false;
let translatorLoaded = false;
// Lazy load rankings when section becomes visible (better LCP)
if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) {
const rankingSection = document.querySelector('.hd-ranking-section');
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
entries.forEach(entry => {
if (entry.isIntersecting) {
// Load with a small delay to not block main thread
if (!rankingLoaded) {
setTimeout(() => loadStoryRanking(currentStoryPeriod), 100);
rankingLoaded = true;
}
if (!translatorLoaded) {
setTimeout(() => loadTranslatorRanking(currentTranslatorPeriod), 200);
translatorLoaded = true;
}
// Disconnect after loading
observer.disconnect();
}
});
}, {
rootMargin: '200px 0px', // Start loading 200px before visible
threshold: 0
});
if (rankingSection) {
observer.observe(rankingSection);
}
} else {
// Fallback for browsers without IntersectionObserver
setTimeout(() => {
loadStoryRanking(currentStoryPeriod);
loadTranslatorRanking(currentTranslatorPeriod);
}, 500);
}
})();
</script>
<!-- thông báo từ BQT -->

<link rel="stylesheet" href="templates/css/hatdaukhaai/style-thong-bao-trang-chu.css?ver=1774712994">

<!-- JSON-LD cho SEO (SSR) -->
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
"@context": "https://schema.org",
"@type": "ItemList",
"name": "Bảng tin Khả Ái",
"description": "Thông báo, hướng dẫn, sự kiện, cập nhật và tin SEO từ Hạt Đậu Khả Ái",
"url": "https://hatdaukhaai.com/tin-tuc",
"itemListElement": [
{
"@type": "ListItem",
"position": 1,
"item": {
"@type": "NewsArticle",
"headline": "Hạt Đậu Khả Ái chính thức ra mắt!",
"url": "https://hatdaukhaai.com/tin-tuc/hat-dau-kha-ai-chinh-thuc-ra-mat",
"datePublished": "2026-02-03T22:34:35+07:00",
"image": "https://hatdaukhaai.com/media/sizes/anh-bai-viet/tb-new-1770132874-1024x572.webp",
"publisher": {
"@type": "Organization",
"name": "Hạt Đậu Khả Ái",
"url": "https://hatdaukhaai.com/"
}
}
}
]
}
</script>

<section class="hdk-bqt-section pt-0" id="hdkBqtSection">
<div class="container-fluid">
<!-- Section Header (SSR cho SEO) -->
<div class="hdk-bqt-header">
<h2 class="hdk-bqt-title">
<span class="hdk-bqt-title-icon">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:bell-bold"></iconify-icon>
</span>
Bảng tin Khả Ái
</h2>
<a href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/tin-tuc" class="hdk-bqt-viewall text-capitalize">
<span class="d-none d-md-inline">Xem</span> tất cả
<iconify-icon icon="solar:arrow-right-linear"></iconify-icon>
</a>
</div>

<!-- Content Grid - Lazy Load Container -->
<div class="hdk-bqt-grid-row" id="hdkBqtContent">
<!-- Skeleton Loading -->
<div class="hdk-bqt-skeleton" id="hdkBqtSkeleton">
<div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-md-2 gx-5 gy-4">
<div class="col">
<!-- Skeleton Featured -->
<div class="hdk-bqt-skeleton-featured">
<div class="hdk-bqt-skeleton-image"></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="col">
<!-- Skeleton List -->
<div class="hdk-bqt-skeleton-list">
<div class="hdk-bqt-skeleton-list-header"></div>
<div class="hdk-bqt-skeleton-item"></div>
<div class="hdk-bqt-skeleton-item"></div>
<div class="hdk-bqt-skeleton-item"></div>
<div class="hdk-bqt-skeleton-item"></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>

<script>
(function() {
const section = document.getElementById('hdkBqtSection');
const contentEl = document.getElementById('hdkBqtContent');
const skeletonEl = document.getElementById('hdkBqtSkeleton');
if (!section || !contentEl) return;
let loaded = false;
function loadBqtContent() {
if (loaded) return;
loaded = true;
fetch('https://hatdaukhaai.com/sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/load-thong-bao-bqt.php', {
method: 'POST',
headers: {
'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
},
body: 'action=load'
})
.then(response => response.json())
.then(data => {
if (data.status === 'success' && data.html) {
// Fade out skeleton
if (skeletonEl) {
skeletonEl.style.opacity = '0';
setTimeout(() => {
skeletonEl.remove();
contentEl.innerHTML = data.html;
// Fade in content
contentEl.style.opacity = '0';
contentEl.style.transition = 'opacity 0.3s ease';
requestAnimationFrame(() => {
contentEl.style.opacity = '1';
});
}, 200);
} else {
contentEl.innerHTML = data.html;
}
} else if (data.empty) {
// Ẩn section nếu không có dữ liệu
section.style.display = 'none';
}
})
.catch(error => {
console.error('Error loading BQT content:', error);
// Fallback: ẩn skeleton, hiện placeholder
if (skeletonEl) skeletonEl.remove();
});
}
// IntersectionObserver - load khi section vào viewport
if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) {
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
entries.forEach(entry => {
if (entry.isIntersecting) {
loadBqtContent();
observer.unobserve(entry.target);
}
});
}, {
rootMargin: '200px 0px', // Load trước 200px
threshold: 0.01
});
observer.observe(section);
} else {
// Fallback: load ngay
loadBqtContent();
}
})();
</script>
</div>

<div class="col-12 col-lg-3">
<div class="hdk-footer-section hdk-footer-newsletter">
<h3 class="hdk-footer-title">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:letter-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
Nhận thông báo
</h3>
<p class="hdk-footer-muted mb-3">Nhận email khi có chương mới và cập nhật quan trọng.</p>

<form id="newsletterForm" class="hdk-newsletter-form" novalidate>
<!-- Honeypot (anti-bot) -->
<input type="text" id="newsletterCompany" name="company" class="hdk-newsletter-honeypot" tabindex="-1" autocomplete="off" aria-hidden="true">

<label class="visually-hidden" for="newsletterEmail">Email</label>
<div class="input-group hdk-newsletter-group">
<input type="email"
id="newsletterEmail"
name="email"
class="form-control hdk-newsletter-input"
placeholder="Email của bạn..."
autocomplete="email"
inputmode="email"
required>
<button type="submit" class="btn hdk-newsletter-btn">
<span data-btn-text>Đăng ký</span>
<span class="hdk-btn-spinner" data-btn-spinner style="display:none;">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:refresh-bold-duotone" class="hdk-spin"></iconify-icon>
</span>
</button>
</div>

<div class="hdk-form-feedback mt-2" id="formFeedback" role="status" aria-live="polite"></div>

<div class="hdk-footer-note mt-2">
Không spam. Bạn có thể hủy đăng ký bất cứ lúc nào.
</div>
</form>
</div>

<script data-cfasync="false" src="/cdn-cgi/scripts/5c5dd728/cloudflare-static/email-decode.min.js"></script><script src="https://socialcare.vn/widget/service.js?key=MkADVsRnu7"></script>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="hdk-footer-bottom">
<div class="container-fluid">
<div class="d-flex flex-column flex-md-row align-items-start align-items-md-center justify-content-between gap-0 gap-md-2">
<div class="hdk-footer-copy d-flex gap-2">
<span>&copy; 2026 Hạt Đậu Khả Ái.</span>
<div class="footer-contact-links">
<span class="hdk-footer-dot d-none d-md-inline">•</span>
<a class="hdk-footer-mini-link" href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/lien-he">Liên hệ</a>
<span class="hdk-footer-dot">•</span>
<a class="hdk-footer-mini-link" href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/phan-hoi">Phản hồi</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="hdk-footer-legal d-flex flex-wrap gap-2">
<a class="hdk-footer-mini-link" href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/huong-dan">Điều khoản</a>
<a class="hdk-footer-mini-link" href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/chinh-sach-bao-mat">Bảo mật</a>
<a class="hdk-footer-mini-link" href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/xoa-du-lieu">Xóa dữ liệu</a>
<a class="hdk-footer-mini-link" href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/huong-dan">Quy định</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</footer>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
const form = document.getElementById('newsletterForm');
if (!form) return;

const emailInput = document.getElementById('newsletterEmail');
const honeypot = document.getElementById('newsletterCompany');
const feedback = document.getElementById('formFeedback');
const submitBtn = form.querySelector('button[type="submit"]');
const btnText = submitBtn ? submitBtn.querySelector('[data-btn-text]') : null;
const btnSpinner = submitBtn ? submitBtn.querySelector('[data-btn-spinner]') : null;

const endpoint = 'https://hatdaukhaai.com/sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/newsletter-subscribe.php';

function setFeedback(message, type) {
if (!feedback) return;
feedback.textContent = message || '';
feedback.className = 'hdk-form-feedback ' + (type ? type : '');
}

function setLoading(isLoading) {
if (submitBtn) submitBtn.disabled = !!isLoading;
if (btnText) btnText.style.display = isLoading ? 'none' : 'inline';
if (btnSpinner) btnSpinner.style.display = isLoading ? 'inline-flex' : 'none';
}

form.addEventListener('submit', async function(e) {
e.preventDefault();

const email = (emailInput && emailInput.value ? emailInput.value : '').trim().toLowerCase();
const company = (honeypot && honeypot.value ? honeypot.value : '').trim();

setFeedback('', '');

if (!email) {
setFeedback('Vui lòng nhập email của bạn.', 'error');
return;
}

const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
if (!emailRegex.test(email)) {
setFeedback('Vui lòng nhập email hợp lệ.', 'error');
return;
}

setLoading(true);

try {
const body = new URLSearchParams();
body.set('email', email);
if (company) body.set('company', company);

const res = await fetch(endpoint, {
method: 'POST',
headers: {
'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=UTF-8'
},
body: body.toString()
});

const raw = await res.text();
let data = null;
try {
data = JSON.parse(raw);
} catch (err) {
data = null;
}

if (!data || typeof data !== 'object') {
throw new Error('Phản hồi không hợp lệ. Vui lòng thử lại.');
}

if (data.status === 'success') {
setFeedback(data.message || 'Đăng ký thành công.', 'success');
if (emailInput) emailInput.value = '';
if (typeof FuiToast !== 'undefined' && FuiToast.success) {
FuiToast.success(data.message || 'Đăng ký thành công!');
}
} else {
setFeedback(data.message || 'Có lỗi xảy ra. Vui lòng thử lại.', 'error');
if (typeof FuiToast !== 'undefined' && FuiToast.error) {
FuiToast.error(data.message || 'Có lỗi xảy ra.');
}
}
} catch (err) {
setFeedback((err && err.message) ? err.message : 'Có lỗi xảy ra. Vui lòng thử lại.', 'error');
if (typeof FuiToast !== 'undefined' && FuiToast.error) {
FuiToast.error('Không thể đăng ký. Vui lòng thử lại.');
}
} finally {
setLoading(false);
}
});
});
</script>






<!-- 📊 Global Settings -->
<script defer src="templates/js/global-settings.js?v=1774712982"></script>
<script defer src="templates/js/hatdaukhaai/theme-toggle.js?v=1774712997"></script>


<script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/select2@4.1.0-rc.0/dist/js/select2.min.js"></script>
<script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/lelinh014756/fui-toast-js@master/assets/js/toast@1.0.1/fuiToast.min.js"></script>
<script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@studio-freight/lenis@latest/bundled/lenis.min.js"></script>

<!-- Swiper - Load conditionally -->
<script defer src="templates/module/swiper/swiper.min.js"></script>

<!-- GSAP, ScrollTrigger, SplitType - Only load on desktop (mobile causes force reflow) -->
<script>
// Only load GSAP on desktop to avoid mobile performance issues
if (window.innerWidth > 768 && !('ontouchstart' in window)) {
window.addEventListener('load', function() {
setTimeout(function() {
var gsapScript = document.createElement('script');
gsapScript.src = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/gsap@3.12.5/dist/gsap.min.js';
gsapScript.onload = function() {
var stScript = document.createElement('script');
stScript.src = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/gsap@3.12.5/dist/ScrollTrigger.min.js';
document.head.appendChild(stScript);

var splitScript = document.createElement('script');
splitScript.src = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/split-type@0.3.4/umd/index.min.js';
document.head.appendChild(splitScript);
};
document.head.appendChild(gsapScript);
}, 1500); // Delay 1.5s after load
});
}
</script>

<!-- Iconify - Load async -->
<script async src="https://code.iconify.design/iconify-icon/3.0.0/iconify-icon.min.js"></script>

<!-- ResponsiveVoice - Load after everything else -->
<script>
// Lazy load ResponsiveVoice only when needed
window.loadResponsiveVoice = function() {
if (!window.responsiveVoiceLoaded) {
var s = document.createElement('script');
s.src = 'https://code.responsivevoice.org/responsivevoice.js?key=240jsndI';
document.head.appendChild(s);
window.responsiveVoiceLoaded = true;
}
};
</script>

<script>
// Utility function for number formatting
function number_format(number) {
return new Intl.NumberFormat('vi-VN').format(number);
}

// Current page for conditional loading
var currentPage = 'index';

// Lenis scroll - Initialize after DOM ready and scripts loaded
// NOTE: Some pages/modules intentionally destroy Lenis (e.g. sidebar pages).
// We must guard RAF loop to avoid "Cannot read properties of null (reading 'raf')".
window.lenis = null;
window.lenisRafId = null;
window.hdkLenisInitAttempts = 0;
window.hdkLenisMaxInitAttempts = 50; // ~5s (50 * 100ms)

// Disable Lenis on touch devices (mobile/tablet) to avoid scroll bugs on some Android WebView/in-app browsers.
// Lenis will remain available on desktop only.
function hdkIsTouchDevice() {
return !!(
('ontouchstart' in window) ||
(navigator.maxTouchPoints && navigator.maxTouchPoints > 0) ||
(navigator.msMaxTouchPoints && navigator.msMaxTouchPoints > 0)
);
}

function hdkIsCoarsePointer() {
try {
return !!(window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(pointer: coarse)').matches);
} catch (e) {
return false;
}
}

function hdkShouldDisableLenis() {
return hdkIsTouchDevice() || hdkIsCoarsePointer();
}

// Cache the decision for the whole session
// Giữ nguyên flag nếu trang đã set trước (VD: farm game page)
if (window.hdkLenisDisabled !== true) {
window.hdkLenisDisabled = false;
try {
window.hdkLenisDisabled = hdkShouldDisableLenis();
} catch (e) {
window.hdkLenisDisabled = false;
}
}
// Cũng disable nếu body/html có class farm page
if (document.documentElement.classList.contains('hdk-farm-page') ||
document.body.classList.contains('hdk-farm-page')) {
window.hdkLenisDisabled = true;
}

function hdkStopLenisRaf() {
if (window.lenisRafId) {
cancelAnimationFrame(window.lenisRafId);
window.lenisRafId = null;
}
}

function hdkDestroyLenis() {
try {
if (window.lenis && typeof window.lenis.destroy === 'function') {
window.lenis.destroy();
}
} catch (e) {
console.warn('[Lenis] destroy error:', e);
} finally {
window.lenis = null;
hdkStopLenisRaf();
}
}

// Expose for modules (e.g. sources/module/sidebar.php)
window.hdkDestroyLenis = hdkDestroyLenis;

/**
* Helper cho modal - dừng Lenis và lock body scroll
* Sử dụng: window.hdkModalOpen?.() khi mở modal
*/
window.hdkModalOpen = function() {
document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
if (typeof window.hdkDestroyLenis === 'function') {
window.hdkDestroyLenis();
}
};

/**
* Helper cho modal - khôi phục Lenis và body scroll
* Sử dụng: window.hdkModalClose?.() khi đóng modal
*/
window.hdkModalClose = function() {
document.body.style.overflow = '';
if (window.hdkLenisDisabled !== true && !window.lenis && typeof initLenis === 'function') {
initLenis();
}
};

function hdkStartLenisRaf() {
if (window.lenisRafId) return;

function raf(time) {
// Lenis may be destroyed by other scripts while RAF loop is running
if (!window.lenis) {
hdkStopLenisRaf();
return;
}
window.lenis.raf(time);
window.lenisRafId = requestAnimationFrame(raf);
}
window.lenisRafId = requestAnimationFrame(raf);
}

function initLenis() {
// Hard disable on touch devices (mobile/tablet)
if (window.hdkLenisDisabled === true) {
hdkDestroyLenis();
return;
}

if (typeof Lenis === 'undefined') {
// Lenis not loaded yet, retry (but do NOT retry forever)
window.hdkLenisInitAttempts = (window.hdkLenisInitAttempts || 0) + 1;
if (window.hdkLenisInitAttempts <= (window.hdkLenisMaxInitAttempts || 50)) {
setTimeout(initLenis, 100);
} else {
console.warn('[Lenis] Lenis not available, stop retrying.');
}
return;
}

// Prevent duplicate init (mouse leave handlers can call initLenis multiple times)
if (window.lenis) return;

// Reset attempts once Lenis is available
window.hdkLenisInitAttempts = 0;

try {
window.lenis = new Lenis({
duration: 1.0,
smoothWheel: true,
smoothTouch: false,
});
} catch (e) {
console.warn('[Lenis] init error:', e);
window.lenis = null;
// Fail-safe: disable further attempts if init throws
window.hdkLenisDisabled = true;
hdkStopLenisRaf();
return;
}

hdkStartLenisRaf();

// Scrollbar visibility
const scrollbar = document.querySelector('.lenis-scrollbar');
if (scrollbar) {
let isScrolling;
window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
scrollbar.classList.add('visible');
clearTimeout(isScrolling);
isScrolling = setTimeout(function() {
scrollbar.classList.remove('visible');
}, 1000);
}, {
passive: true
});
}

// Update scrollbar thumb position
const scrollbarThumb = document.querySelector('.lenis-scrollbar-thumb');
if (scrollbar && scrollbarThumb) {
window.lenis.on('scroll', ({
scroll,
limit
}) => {
const scrollRatio = scroll / limit;
const thumbPosition = scrollRatio * (scrollbar.clientHeight - scrollbarThumb.clientHeight);
scrollbarThumb.style.transform = `translateY(${thumbPosition}px)`;
});

// Drag scrollbar thumb
let isDragging = false;
let startY = 0;
let startScroll = 0;

scrollbarThumb.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
if (!window.lenis) return;
isDragging = true;
startY = e.clientY;
startScroll = window.lenis.scroll || 0;
document.body.style.userSelect = 'none';
});

document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
if (!isDragging) return;
if (!window.lenis) {
isDragging = false;
document.body.style.userSelect = '';
return;
}
const deltaY = e.clientY - startY;
const scrollAmount = deltaY * (window.lenis.limit / (scrollbar.clientHeight - scrollbarThumb.clientHeight));
window.lenis.scrollTo(startScroll + scrollAmount, {
immediate: true
});
});

document.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
if (isDragging) {
isDragging = false;
document.body.style.userSelect = '';
}
});
}

// GSAP integration (if available)
if (typeof gsap !== 'undefined' && typeof ScrollTrigger !== 'undefined') {
gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger);
window.lenis.on('scroll', ScrollTrigger.update);
ScrollTrigger.scrollerProxy(document.body, {
scrollTop(value) {
return arguments.length ? window.lenis.scrollTo(value) : window.lenis.scroll;
},
getBoundingClientRect() {
return {
top: 0,
left: 0,
width: window.innerWidth,
height: window.innerHeight
};
},
});
}
}

// Initialize after DOM ready
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
// Delay Lenis init to not block main thread
if (window.hdkLenisDisabled !== true) {
setTimeout(initLenis, 100);
} else {
hdkDestroyLenis();
}

// Fancybox init
if (typeof Fancybox !== 'undefined') {
Fancybox.bind("[data-fancybox]", {});
}

// Text animation with SplitType (only on desktop, delay for performance)
if (window.innerWidth > 768 && !('ontouchstart' in window)) {
setTimeout(function() {
if (typeof gsap === 'undefined' || typeof SplitType === 'undefined') return;

let textTitles = gsap.utils.toArray('.vanhiep-title');
textTitles.forEach((title) => {
let splitTitle = new SplitType(title, {
types: 'chars'
});
gsap.to(splitTitle.chars, {
autoAlpha: 1,
y: 0,
stagger: 0.1,
rotate: 0,
ease: 'power2.out',
scrollTrigger: {
trigger: title,
start: 'top 80%',
},
});
});

if (typeof ScrollTrigger !== 'undefined') {
ScrollTrigger.refresh();
}
}, 2000); // Delay 2s for better LCP
}

// Pause Lenis on specific elements (for nested scrolling)
const pauseSelectors = '.ql-editor, .vh-scrollbar, .select2-results__options, .emojionearea-scroll-area, .emojionearea .emojionearea-editor, .mdv-charts-box-content-item-content, .msv-chuong-list-container, .danh-sach-the-loai-chinh-ul, .tim-kiem-thanh-vien-result, #modalDanhSachChuong .modal-dialog-scrollable .modal-body, .hydrosite-custom-scrollbar';

document.querySelectorAll(pauseSelectors).forEach(el => {
el.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() {
if (typeof window.hdkDestroyLenis === 'function') {
window.hdkDestroyLenis();
} else if (window.lenis) {
// Fallback safety
try { window.lenis.destroy(); } catch (e) {}
window.lenis = null;
}
});
el.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
if (window.hdkLenisDisabled === true) return;
if (!window.lenis) {
initLenis();
}
});
});
});

function scrollToElement(selector, duration = 3.0, offset = 0) {
const element = document.querySelector(selector);

if (!element) return;

// Use Lenis only when enabled and initialized; otherwise fallback to native smooth scroll (mobile/tablet safe).
if (window.hdkLenisDisabled === true || !window.lenis) {
const currentScrollTop = window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop || 0;
const targetTop = element.getBoundingClientRect().top + currentScrollTop + (Number(offset) || 0);
window.scrollTo({
top: targetTop,
behavior: 'smooth'
});
} else {
window.lenis.scrollTo(selector, {
duration: duration,
offset: offset,
});
}
}
</script>

<!-- 📦 CORE SCRIPTS - Deferred loading -->
<script defer src="templates/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js"></script>
<script defer src="templates/module/sweetalert/sweetalert2.min.js"></script>

<!-- ❤️ FAVORITE STORY HANDLER - Global handler for all favorite buttons -->
<script defer src="templates/js/hd-favorite-story.js"></script>

<!-- 🤖 AI Chat Widget (UI + AJAX) -->
<script defer src="templates/js/hatdaukhaai/ai-chat-widget.js?v=1774712997"></script>
<script>
// Set global variables for favorite handler
window.hdkUserLoggedIn = false;
window.hdkBaseUrl = 'https://hatdaukhaai.com/';
window.hdkAjaxUrl = 'https://hatdaukhaai.com/sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/';

// PWA: Register Service Worker với Auto-Update Detection
// Note: We intentionally DO NOT cache assets yet to avoid stale UI/content issues.
if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) {
// TrA­nh reload "nh §¥p nhA¡y" khi l §§n Ž` §§u CA i SW (ch §‰ reload khi user b §¥m c §­p nh §­t)
window.hdkPwaUpdateRequested = false;
window.hdkIsReloading = false;
window.hdkHasUnsavedChanges = !!window.hdkHasUnsavedChanges;

window.addEventListener('load', function() {
navigator.serviceWorker.register('sw.js').then(function(registration) {
console.log('[PWA] Service Worker registered successfully');
// Kiểm tra update mỗi 30 phút (chỉ khi tab active)
setInterval(function() {
if (!document.hidden) {
registration.update().catch(function() {});
}
}, 30 * 60 * 1000);
// Kiểm tra update ngay khi tab được focus lại
document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', function() {
if (!document.hidden) {
registration.update().catch(function() {});
}
});
// Detect khi có SW mới đang waiting
if (registration.waiting) {
hdkShowUpdateNotification(registration.waiting);
}
// Detect khi có SW mới được install
registration.addEventListener('updatefound', function() {
var newWorker = registration.installing;
if (newWorker) {
newWorker.addEventListener('statechange', function() {
if (newWorker.state === 'installed' && navigator.serviceWorker.controller) {
// Có update mới
hdkShowUpdateNotification(newWorker);
}
});
}
});
}).catch(function(err) {
console.warn('[PWA] Service Worker registration failed:', err);
});
// Listen message từ SW khi có update
navigator.serviceWorker.addEventListener('message', function(event) {
if (event.data && event.data.type === 'SW_UPDATED') {
console.log('[PWA] Service Worker activated:', event.data.version);
// Auto reload nếu không có unsaved changes
if (window.hdkPwaUpdateRequested && !window.hdkHasUnsavedChanges && !window.hdkIsReloading) {
window.hdkIsReloading = true;
window.location.reload();
}
}
});
// Detect khi SW controller thay đổi (update đã activate)
navigator.serviceWorker.addEventListener('controllerchange', function() {
// SW đã được cập nhật, reload để lấy code mới
if (window.hdkPwaUpdateRequested && !window.hdkHasUnsavedChanges && !window.hdkIsReloading) {
window.hdkIsReloading = true;
window.location.reload();
}
});
});
}

// Hiển thị notification update (non-blocking)
function hdkShowUpdateNotification(worker) {
// Chỉ hiển thị nếu user chưa dismiss trong session này
if (sessionStorage.getItem('hdkDismissedUpdate')) return;
// Tạo notification bar
var notifHtml = '<div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2 flex-column flex-md-row" id="hdkUpdateNotification" style="' +
'position: fixed; bottom: 20px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);' +
'background: linear-gradient(135deg, #54cfd6 0%, #48b8be 100%);' +
'color: #fff; padding: 12px 20px; border-radius: 12px;' +
'box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(84, 207, 214, 0.4);' +
'z-index: 9999; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;' +
'font-family: \"Be Vietnam Pro\", sans-serif; font-size: 14px;' +
'width: max-content;' +
'max-width: 90vw;' +
'animation: hdkSlideUp 0.3s ease;' +
'">' +
'<span>🎉 Có bản cập nhật mới!</span>' +
'<button onclick="hdkApplyUpdate()" style="' +
'background: #fff; color: #48b8be; border: none;' +
'padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 20px;' +
'font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px;' +
'">Cập nhật</button>' +
'<button onclick="hdkDismissUpdate()" style="' +
'background: transparent; color: #fff; border: none;' +
'padding: 6px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1;' +
'">×</button>' +
'</div>' +
'<style>@keyframes hdkSlideUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); } }</style>';
// Remove existing notification if any
var existing = document.getElementById('hdkUpdateNotification');
if (existing) existing.remove();
// Append to body
document.body.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', notifHtml);
// Lưu reference tới waiting worker
window.hdkWaitingWorker = worker;
}

function hdkApplyUpdate() {
window.hdkPwaUpdateRequested = true;
if (window.hdkWaitingWorker) {
window.hdkWaitingWorker.postMessage({ type: 'SKIP_WAITING' });
}
// Notification sẽ tự biến mất khi page reload
}

function hdkDismissUpdate() {
sessionStorage.setItem('hdkDismissedUpdate', '1');
var notif = document.getElementById('hdkUpdateNotification');
if (notif) notif.remove();
}

// PWA: Install UX helper
// - Android/Chromium: use beforeinstallprompt (when available)
// - iOS: show a short guide (Safari -> Share -> Add to Home Screen)
(function() {
var deferredPrompt = null;

function getInstallBtn() {
return document.getElementById('hdkPwaInstallBtn');
}

function isIosDevice() {
return /iphone|ipad|ipod/i.test(navigator.userAgent || '');
}

function isStandaloneMode() {
var isStandaloneDisplay = false;
try {
isStandaloneDisplay = window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(display-mode: standalone)').matches;
} catch (e) {}

// iOS Safari legacy
var isStandaloneIos = (window.navigator && window.navigator.standalone === true);
return isStandaloneDisplay || isStandaloneIos;
}

function applyPwaStandaloneClass() {
if (!isStandaloneMode()) return;
try { document.documentElement.classList.add('hdk-is-pwa'); } catch (e) {}
try { if (document.body) document.body.classList.add('hdk-is-pwa'); } catch (e) {}
}

function showBtn() {
var btn = getInstallBtn();
if (!btn) return;
if (isStandaloneMode()) {
btn.style.display = 'none';
return;
}
btn.style.display = '';
}

function hideBtn() {
var btn = getInstallBtn();
if (!btn) return;
btn.style.display = 'none';
}

function showIosGuide() {
var html = '<div style="text-align:left;line-height:1.5">'
+ '<div><b>Bước 1:</b> Mở trang bằng <b>Safari</b></div>'
+ '<div><b>Bước 2:</b> Nhấn nút <b>Chia sẻ</b> (Share)</div>'
+ '<div><b>Bước 3:</b> Chọn <b>Thêm vào Màn hình chính</b> (Add to Home Screen)</div>'
+ '</div>';

if (typeof Swal !== 'undefined') {
Swal.fire({
icon: 'info',
title: 'Cài đặt ứng dụng',
html: html,
confirmButtonText: 'Đã hiểu'
});
} else {
alert('Trên iPhone/iPad: mở bằng Safari → Chia sẻ (Share) → Thêm vào Màn hình chính (Add to Home Screen).');
}
}

// Bind iOS guide (immediate availability)
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
applyPwaStandaloneClass();
var btn = getInstallBtn();
if (!btn) return;
if (isStandaloneMode()) {
hideBtn();
return;
}

if (isIosDevice()) {
showBtn();
if (!btn.dataset.pwaBound) {
btn.dataset.pwaBound = 'ios';
btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
e.preventDefault();
showIosGuide();
});
}
}
});

// Android/Chromium install prompt
window.addEventListener('beforeinstallprompt', function(e) {
// Only Chromium fires this; iOS won't.
e.preventDefault();
deferredPrompt = e;

var btn = getInstallBtn();
if (!btn) return;
if (isStandaloneMode()) {
hideBtn();
return;
}

showBtn();
if (btn.dataset.pwaBound !== 'android') {
btn.dataset.pwaBound = 'android';
btn.addEventListener('click', function(ev) {
ev.preventDefault();
if (!deferredPrompt) return;

deferredPrompt.prompt();
// Always clear prompt after user choice (avoid reusing stale event)
Promise.resolve(deferredPrompt.userChoice).finally(function() {
deferredPrompt = null;
hideBtn();
});
});
}
});

// Hide after installation completes
window.addEventListener('appinstalled', function() {
deferredPrompt = null;
hideBtn();
});
})();
</script>




<script>
// 🌟 Theme Management (backward compatibility)
function applyTheme(theme) {
if (window.hdkThemeUtils) {
window.hdkThemeUtils.setTheme(theme);
} else {
localStorage.setItem("hdkTheme", theme);
location.reload();
}
}

// Header padding adjustment
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
requestAnimationFrame(function() {
const mdv_header = document.querySelector(".mdv-header");
const mdv_mobile = document.querySelector(".mdv-menu-mobile, .hdmobile-story-header");
const fixPadding = document.querySelector(".fix-padding-top");
if (!fixPadding) return;
if (window.innerWidth > 1024 && mdv_header) {
fixPadding.style.paddingTop = (mdv_header.offsetHeight + 50) + 'px';
} else if (mdv_mobile) {
fixPadding.style.paddingTop = (mdv_mobile.offsetHeight + 10) + 'px';
}
});
});

// Theme button handlers
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
const currentTheme = localStorage.getItem("hdkTheme") || "light";
document.querySelectorAll(".btn-theme").forEach(function(btn) {
btn.classList.toggle("active", btn.dataset.theme === currentTheme);
btn.addEventListener("click", function() {
applyTheme(this.dataset.theme);
});
});
});
</script>

<!-- 🎠 SWIPER INITIALIZATIONS - Only run when elements exist -->
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
// Delay Swiper init for better performance
setTimeout(function() {
if (typeof Swiper === 'undefined') return;
// "Có thể bạn thích" Swiper
if (document.querySelector(".swiper-may-like")) {
new Swiper(".swiper-may-like", {
slidesPerView: 2,
spaceBetween: 20,
loop: true,
freeMode: true,
grabCursor: true,
autoplay: { delay: 0, disableOnInteraction: true },
speed: 5000,
breakpoints: {
640: { slidesPerView: 3 },
768: { slidesPerView: 4 },
1024: { slidesPerView: 5 },
},
});
}

// Truyện hoàn thành Swiper
if (document.querySelector(".swiper-complete-comic")) {
new Swiper(".swiper-complete-comic", {
slidesPerView: 5,
lazy: true,
speed: 2000,
autoplay: true,
breakpoints: {
640: { slidesPerView: 5 },
768: { slidesPerView: 6 },
1024: { slidesPerView: 8 },
},
});
}

// Đề cử Swiper
if (document.querySelector(".swiper-mdv-comic-nominate")) {
new Swiper(".swiper-mdv-comic-nominate", {
slidesPerView: 3,
centeredSlides: true,
initialSlide: 2,
navigation: {
nextEl: ".nominate-navigate-next",
prevEl: ".nominate-navigate-prev",
},
autoplay: true,
speed: 2000,
breakpoints: {
1024: { slidesPerView: 5 },
},
});
}

// Quảng bá Swiper
if (document.querySelector(".swiper-slider-quang-ba")) {
new Swiper(".swiper-slider-quang-ba", {
slidesPerView: 3,
loop: true,
freeMode: true,
autoplay: { delay: 0, disableOnInteraction: true },
speed: 5000,
lazy: true,
breakpoints: {
320: { enabled: false },
768: { enabled: false },
1024: { slidesPerView: 8 },
1200: { slidesPerView: 10 },
},
});
}

// Độc quyền Swiper
if (document.querySelector(".swiper-slider-advertise")) {
new Swiper(".swiper-slider-advertise", {
slidesPerView: 5,
loop: true,
freeMode: true,
autoplay: { delay: 0, disableOnInteraction: true },
speed: 5000,
lazy: true,
breakpoints: {
640: { slidesPerView: 5 },
768: { slidesPerView: 6 },
1024: { slidesPerView: 8 },
1200: { slidesPerView: 10 },
},
});
}

// Top hot Swiper
if (document.querySelector(".mdv-sliders-top-swiper")) {
new Swiper(".mdv-sliders-top-swiper", {
pagination: { el: ".mdv-slider-top-pagination", clickable: true },
autoplay: true,
speed: 1000,
effect: "fade",
});
}
}, 200); // Small delay for performance

// Book item height adjustment
document.querySelectorAll(".msv-comic-book-item").forEach(function(content) {
var h2 = content.querySelector(".left-side h2");
if (h2) h2.style.width = content.offsetHeight + 'px';
});
});
</script>

<!-- 🔧 UTILITY FUNCTIONS -->
<script>
// Input restriction utilities
function limitAndRestrictInput(inputElement, maxLength) {
var sanitizedValue = inputElement.value.replace(/[^\w\d]/g, '');
if (sanitizedValue.length > maxLength) {
sanitizedValue = sanitizedValue.slice(0, maxLength);
}
inputElement.value = sanitizedValue;
}

function limitInputLength(inputElement, maxLength) {
if (inputElement.value.length > maxLength) {
inputElement.value = inputElement.value.slice(0, maxLength);
}
}

// Navigation
function goBack() {
window.history.back();
}
</script>

<!-- 📷 IMAGE LIGHTBOX - Initialize Fancybox for images -->
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
// Delay to not block main thread
setTimeout(function() {
const imageContainers = [
'.vs-product-detail-content-box-text img',
'.vs-product-detail-content-card img',
'.tin-tuc-detail section img',
'.vanhiep-content img'
];
imageContainers.forEach(function(selector) {
document.querySelectorAll(selector).forEach(function(img) {
if (img.closest('a[data-fancybox]')) return; // Already wrapped
var wrapper = document.createElement('a');
wrapper.setAttribute('data-fancybox', 'images');
wrapper.setAttribute('href', img.getAttribute('src'));
img.parentNode.insertBefore(wrapper, img);
wrapper.appendChild(img);
});
});
}, 500);
});
</script>

<!-- 📏 Match Height Plugin -->
<script defer src="templates/js/jquery.matchHeight-min.js"></script>
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
setTimeout(function() {
if (typeof $.fn.matchHeight !== 'undefined') {
$('.col-text').matchHeight();
}
}, 300);
});
</script>

<!-- 📬 Contact/Alert Messages -->
