<!-- chat box widget -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/templates/css/hatdaukhaai/style-ai-chat-widget.css?v=1774712992">
<div
class="ai-chat-widget"
hidden
role="complementary"
aria-label="AI chat widget"
data-logged-in="0"
data-user-id="0"
data-base-url="https://hatdaukhaai.com/"
data-login-url="https://hatdaukhaai.com/dang-nhap"
data-ajax-endpoint="https://hatdaukhaai.com/sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/ai-chat-send.php"
data-history-endpoint="https://hatdaukhaai.com/sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/ai-chat-history.php"
data-user-avatar="https://hatdaukhaai.com/templates/images/avatar-default.webp"
data-csrf="88e1248618887f84537e592f187a7e28cf6dc96c"
data-pwa-push-enabled="1"
data-pwa-push-actions-endpoint="https://hatdaukhaai.com/sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/pwa-push-actions.php"
data-pwa-reward-enabled="1"
data-pwa-reward-hat="100"
data-pwa-reward-title="Cài app nhận ngay 100 Hạt"
data-pwa-reward-desc="Cài ứng dụng Hạt Đậu Khả Ái để dùng mượt hơn và nhận ngay phần thưởng 100 Hạt."
data-pwa-reward-video-url="https://hatdaukhaai.com/uploads/files/pwa-app.mp4"
data-pwa-reward-video-poster=""
data-pwa-reward-status-endpoint="https://hatdaukhaai.com/sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/pwa-reward-status.php"
data-pwa-reward-mark-seen-endpoint="https://hatdaukhaai.com/sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/pwa-reward-mark-seen.php"
data-pwa-reward-pending-endpoint="https://hatdaukhaai.com/sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/pwa-reward-pending.php"
data-pwa-reward-claim-endpoint="https://hatdaukhaai.com/sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/pwa-reward-claim.php"
data-pwa-reward-debug-endpoint="https://hatdaukhaai.com/sources/ajax/hatdaukhaai/pwa-reward-debug.php">
<div class="ai-chat-panel" role="dialog" aria-label="Chat window" aria-hidden="true" inert>
<div class="ai-chat-header">
<div class="ai-chat-header-left">
<div class="ai-chat-avatar-wrap">
<div class="ai-chat-avatar">
<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" src="https://hatdaukhaai.com/templates/images/hat-dau-kha-ai-ai-assistant-mini.webp" alt="avatar ai assistant">
</div>
<div class="ai-chat-status-dot" aria-hidden="true"></div>
</div>
<div class="ai-chat-bot">
<h2 class="ai-chat-title">Trợ Lý AI Hạt Đậu Khả Ái</h2>
<p class="ai-chat-subtitle">Gợi ý truyện • Hướng dẫn tính năng • Tử vi (tham khảo)</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="ai-chat-header-actions">
<button type="button" class="ai-chat-icon-btn" aria-label="Close">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:close-circle-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
</button>
</div>
</div>

<div class="ai-chat-messages custom-scrollbar vh-scrollbar">
<div class="ai-chat-day">
<div class="ai-chat-day-badge"><span>Hôm nay</span></div>
</div>

<div class="ai-chat-row ai-chat-row--in">
<div class="ai-chat-user-avatar ai-chat-user-avatar--in">
<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" src="https://hatdaukhaai.com/templates/images/hat-dau-kha-ai-ai-assistant.webp" alt="avatar user">
</div>
<div class="ai-chat-bubble ai-chat-bubble--in bubble-tail-in">
<p>
Xin chào! Mình là trợ lý AI của <strong>Hạt Đậu Khả Ái</strong>.
Bạn có thể nhắn thể loại/gu đọc để mình gợi ý truyện kèm link đọc, hoặc nhờ mình xem <strong>cung hoàng đạo/tử vi (tham khảo)</strong> — chỉ cần gửi ngày sinh (dd/mm) nhé.
</p>
<div class="ai-chat-meta">
<span class="ai-chat-time">09:41 AM</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="ai-chat-row ai-chat-row--in">
<div class="ai-chat-user-avatar ai-chat-user-avatar--in">
<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" src="https://hatdaukhaai.com/templates/images/hat-dau-kha-ai-ai-assistant.webp" alt="avatar user">
</div>
<div class="ai-chat-bubble ai-chat-bubble--in bubble-tail-in">
<p class="ai-chat-bubble-text--spaced">
Bạn cần <strong>đăng nhập</strong> để sử dụng trợ lý AI.
</p>
<div class="ai-chat-quick">
<a class="ai-chat-quick-btn" href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/dang-nhap">Đăng nhập</a>
<button type="button" class="ai-chat-quick-btn" data-ai-chat-close>Đóng</button>
</div>
<div class="ai-chat-meta">
<span class="ai-chat-time">09:41 AM</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="ai-chat-footer">
<div class="ai-chat-input-wrap">
<div class="ai-chat-emoji">
<button
type="button"
class="ai-chat-tool-btn ai-chat-tool-btn--mr"
aria-label="Emoji"
data-ai-chat-emoji-toggle
disabled>
<iconify-icon icon="solar:smile-circle-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
</button>
<div class="emoji-picker" data-ai-chat-emoji-picker>
<div class="emoji-picker-tabs">
<div class="emoji-picker-tab active" data-category="smileys">😀</div>
<div class="emoji-picker-tab" data-category="hearts">❤️</div>
<div class="emoji-picker-tab" data-category="animals">🐶</div>
<div class="emoji-picker-tab" data-category="food">🍎</div>
<div class="emoji-picker-tab" data-category="objects">🏠</div>
</div>
<div class="emoji-picker-content" data-ai-chat-emoji-content>
<div class="emoji-item">😀</div>
<div class="emoji-item">😁</div>
<div class="emoji-item">😂</div>
<div class="emoji-item">🤣</div>
<div class="emoji-item">😃</div>
<div class="emoji-item">😄</div>
<div class="emoji-item">😅</div>
<div class="emoji-item">😆</div>
<div class="emoji-item">😉</div>
<div class="emoji-item">😊</div>
<div class="emoji-item">😋</div>
<div class="emoji-item">😎</div>
<div class="emoji-item">😍</div>
<div class="emoji-item">😘</div>
<div class="emoji-item">😗</div>
<div class="emoji-item">😙</div>
<div class="emoji-item">😚</div>
<div class="emoji-item">🙂</div>
<div class="emoji-item">🤗</div>
<div class="emoji-item">🤩</div>
<div class="emoji-item">🤔</div>
<div class="emoji-item">🤨</div>
<div class="emoji-item">😐</div>
<div class="emoji-item">😑</div>
<div class="emoji-item">🔥</div>
<div class="emoji-item">👍</div>
<div class="emoji-item">👎</div>
<div class="emoji-item">👏</div>
<div class="emoji-item">💪</div>
<div class="emoji-item">🎉</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<input
class="ai-chat-input"
placeholder="Vui lòng đăng nhập để chat"
type="text"
maxlength="5000"
aria-label="Message"
disabled />
</div>
<div class="ai-chat-send">
<button
type="button"
class="ai-chat-send-btn"
aria-label="Send message"
disabled>
<iconify-icon icon="solar:map-arrow-right-bold"></iconify-icon>
</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Tools Dropdown (hiện khi click FAB) - mỗi item nổi riêng, không có nền container -->
<div class="ai-chat-tools-dropdown" hidden aria-label="Công cụ">
<a href="https://www.facebook.com/hatdaukhaai" target="_blank" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" class="ai-chat-tools-item ai-chat-tools-item--pill">
<span class="ai-chat-tools-icon ai-chat-tools-icon--blue"><iconify-icon icon="ic:baseline-facebook"></iconify-icon></span>
<span class="ai-chat-tools-label">Liên hệ Admin</span>
</a>
<a href="https://hatdaukhaai.com/game/vuon-hat" class="ai-chat-tools-item ai-chat-tools-item--featured">
<span class="ai-chat-tools-icon ai-chat-tools-icon--featured"><iconify-icon icon="solar:leaf-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon></span>
<span class="ai-chat-tools-label">Vườn hạt<small class="ai-chat-tools-badge">Game</small></span>
</a>
<button
type="button"
class="ai-chat-tools-item ai-chat-tools-item--reward d-none"
data-action="open-pwa-reward"
id="aiPwaRewardTrigger"
hidden>
<span class="ai-chat-tools-icon ai-chat-tools-icon--reward"><iconify-icon icon="solar:download-minimalistic-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon></span>
<span class="ai-chat-tools-label">Cài app nhận thưởng<small class="ai-chat-tools-badge ai-chat-tools-badge--reward">+100 Hạt</small></span>
</button>
<button type="button" class="ai-chat-tools-item ai-chat-tools-item--pill" data-action="open-chat">
<span class="ai-chat-tools-icon"><iconify-icon icon="solar:chat-round-dots-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon></span>
<span class="ai-chat-tools-label">Chat với AI</span>
</button>
</div>

<button type="button" class="ai-chat-fab" aria-label="Công cụ" aria-haspopup="true" aria-expanded="false">
<span class="ai-chat-fab-ping" aria-hidden="true"></span>
<span class="ai-chat-fab-overlay" aria-hidden="true"></span>
<iconify-icon icon="solar:widget-5-bold-duotone" class="ai-chat-fab-icon ai-chat-fab-icon--tools"></iconify-icon>
<iconify-icon icon="solar:close-circle-bold" class="ai-chat-fab-icon ai-chat-fab-icon--close" style="display:none"></iconify-icon>
</button>
</div>

<!-- background blur overlay -->
<div class="ai-chat-widget-overlay" hidden></div>

<!-- PWA Reward Modal -->
<div class="ai-pwa-reward-modal" id="aiPwaRewardModal" hidden aria-hidden="true">
<div class="ai-pwa-reward-modal__backdrop" data-action="close-pwa-reward"></div>
<div class="ai-pwa-reward-modal__dialog vh-scrollbar" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Nhận thưởng cài ứng dụng PWA">
<button type="button" class="ai-pwa-reward-modal__close" aria-label="Đóng" data-action="close-pwa-reward">
<iconify-icon icon="solar:close-circle-bold-duotone"></iconify-icon>
</button>
<div class="ai-pwa-reward-modal__header">
<h3 class="ai-pwa-reward-modal__title">Cài app nhận ngay 100 Hạt</h3>
<p class="ai-pwa-reward-modal__subtitle">Cài ứng dụng Hạt Đậu Khả Ái để dùng mượt hơn và nhận ngay phần thưởng 100 Hạt.</p>
</div>
<div class="ai-pwa-reward-modal__video-wrap">
<video
class="ai-pwa-reward-modal__video"
id="aiPwaRewardVideo"
autoplay
loop
muted
playsinline
preload="none"
poster=""
data-video-url="https://hatdaukhaai.com/uploads/files/pwa-app.mp4"></video>
</div>
<div class="ai-pwa-reward-modal__status" id="aiPwaRewardStatusText">
Mở ứng dụng ở chế độ đã cài để nhận thưởng 100 Hạt.
</div>
<div class="ai-pwa-reward-modal__actions">
<button type="button" class="ai-pwa-reward-btn ai-pwa-reward-btn--ghost" data-action="close-pwa-reward">Để sau</button>
<button type="button" class="ai-pwa-reward-btn ai-pwa-reward-btn--ghost" id="aiPwaRewardRetryBtn" hidden>Kiểm tra lại</button>
<button type="button" class="ai-pwa-reward-btn ai-pwa-reward-btn--primary" id="aiPwaRewardClaimBtn">
Bật thông báo để nhận 100 Hạt
</button>
</div>
<div class="ai-pwa-reward-modal__permission-guide" id="aiPwaRewardPermissionGuide" hidden>
Bạn đã từ chối quyền thông báo. Để nhận thưởng, hãy bật quyền thông báo cho ứng dụng trong Cài đặt trình duyệt, sau đó nhấn
<strong>Kiểm tra lại</strong> để tiếp tục.
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Admin Message Toast (chỉ khi đăng nhập) -->
